consent of the publisher. Any unauthorized use, sharing, reproduction or distribution of these materials by any
means is strictly prohibited. Requests for permission to reproduce content contained herein shall be sent via e-
mail to our Permissions Department via e-mail (support@gkic.com) or facsimile (312) 880-1201.
This Presentation (“Presentation”) has been prepared
by or on behalf of Glazer-Kennedy Insider’s Circle, LLC
and/or its affiliated companies (“GKIC”) for the purpose
of setting out certain confidential information regarding
GKIC’s 	business 	activities, 	plans 	and 	strategy.
References to “Presentation” include any information
which has been or may be supplied in writing or orally
by or on behalf of GKIC in connection with the
Presentation or in response to any follow-up inquiries
from the Presentation.
This Presentation and the information contained herein
are confidential. 	In addition to the terms of any
confidentiality agreement you may sign with GKIC, by
viewing the Presentation you agree that you and each of
your agents, representatives, advisors, directors or
employees (collectively, “Representatives”) will not,
and will not permit any third party to, copy, reproduce
or distribute to others this Presentation, in whole or in
part, at any time without the prior written consent of
GKIC, and that you and all Representatives will keep
confidential all information contained herein not already
in the public domain and will use this Presentation for
the sole purpose of familiarizing yourself with certain
limited background information concerning GKIC and its
business strategy, plans and activities. 	If you have
signed a confidentiality agreement with GKIC, this
Presentation constitutes Confidential Information for
the purposes of such agreement. If you do not agree to
the terms of this Notice, you may NOT view, copy or
distribute any portion of this Presentation.
While the information contained in this Presentation is
believed to be accurate, GKIC has not conducted any
investigation with respect to such information. 	GKIC
expressly 	disclaims 	any 	and 	all 	liability 	for
representations or warranties, expressed or implied,
contained in, or for omissions from, this Presentation or
any other written or oral communication transmitted to
any 	interested 	party 	in 	connection 	with 	this
Presentation, so far as is permitted by law.
No representation or warranty is given as to the
achievement or reasonableness of, and no reliance
should be placed on, any projections, estimates,
forecasts, analyses or forward-looking statements
contained in this Presentation which involve by their
nature a number of risks, uncertainties or assumptions
that could cause actual results or events to differ
materially from those expressed or implied in this
Presentation. 	Except 	to 	the 	extent 	otherwise
indicated, this Presentation presents information as of
the date hereof. The delivery of this Presentation shall
not, under any circumstances, create any implication
that there will be no change in the affairs of GKIC after
the date hereof. In furnishing this Presentation, GKIC
reserves 	the 	right 	to 	amend 	or 	replace 	this
Presentation at any time and undertakes no obligation
to update any of the information contained in the
Presentation or to correct any inaccuracies that may
become apparent.
This Presentation shall remain the property of GKIC.
GKIC may, at any time, request that you and/or your
Representatives 	promptly 	deliver 	to 	GKIC 	or, 	if
directed in writing by GKIC, destroy all confidential

notes, 	analyses 	or 	compilations 	constituting 	or

VALUABLE LICENSE
CERTIFICATE
With your investment of this Kit, you have automatically
received certain rights to use certain materials included in the Kit.
Here are the terms of that agreement:
This Certificate authorizes (only) the purchaser/owner of this Magnetic
Marketing System & Tool Kit to use, for the purposes of advertising and marketing
your own products, services and businesses, any or all of the marketing documents
or ideas, themes, actual copy contained within the marketing documents designated
as “Copyright Free.” (Materials included in this Kit not so designated are not covered
by this license and may be separately copyright protected.) This License is non-
transferable. This License does NOT convey the right to use or reproduce any of the
included materials for re-sale or replication or distribution. License is voided should Kit
be returned for refund, and any individual returning Kit for refund is then precluded from
subsequently using, in part or whole, any of the materials included herein, including those
designed as ‘Copyright Free.’ It is our policy to enforce our copyrights and protect our
intellectual property. A License Agreement of this type frequently and typically involves
the payment of royalties or annual renewal fees by the licensee to the licensor, however
in this case, all such fees are waived. This is a Lifetime License. Questions should be
directed to: GKIC, 8430 W. Bryn Mawr Ave. Suite 500, Chicago, IL 60631.
Note: no warranties have been made as to the result any individual may expect or
obtain from use of any or all of the materials and instructions in the Kit. Licensee is also
fully responsible for determining the legality of use in his particular geographic area
and/or industry and specific application. Neither the author, publisher or licensor accepts
any liability for same.

Section 1
Business to
Consumer
Business to consumer encompasses those
businesses where the consumer is the end
user of the product and/or service.
You will find the now famous “Giorgio
Letters” in this section.
9
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 625 --

Restaurant
The now-famous "Giorgio Letters" - Letter 1
COPYRIGHT FREE
Picture
Of You
April 16th
Dear Husband,
Women are different than we are. (Vive le ‘difference!) YOUR loving
wife needs, wants and deserves SPECIAL ATTENTION maybe more often than
you think to give to her.
You are busy. Pre-occupied with work. Aggravated with that dumb-
dumb that you have to deal with every day at the office. Tired. Who has
time or the energy to even think about “romance”? (Two-thirds of all
marriages end in divorce and the number one reason given by divorcing
women – “he just didn’t pay enough attention to me anymore.”)
For you, my friend, I have got a SOLUTION!
With this letter, YOU are entitled to an evening charmed by all the
creativity of Giorgio, the Official Romance Director!
When you and your Very-Significant-Other arrive at Giorgio’s, you’ll
be ushered to the special dining room it only by candlelight and the roaring fire
in the fireplace… with the view of the sunset or starry night over the harbor!
(When you make your reservation, I will GUARANTEE your choice of a
near-the-fireplace or window-side table!)
In this under crowded, intimate dining room there will be NO families,
NO CHILDREN, NO disruptions. Quiet good music. A peaceful environment.
A haven from the hustle, bustle, noise and pushing and shoving and rushing
of the real world.
On your table, in a crystal bud vase, there will be a single dewy fresh
red rose for your lady. (It and the vase are hers to take home.)
We will begin with a carafe of our wonderful house Italian wine – red or
white, your choice – compliments of Giorgio! And fresh baked, piping hot,
lightly garlic-buttered, crusty Italian breadsticks.
Next page
please…
A Confidential Letter To The
Husband Of The House From
Giorgio
- Romance Director
Giorgio’s Italian Grotto
“She may be waiting… just anticipating… things
she may never possess… but while she’s waiting,
try a little tenderness…”
Attention
Getting
Headline With
Picture
Problem
Agitate
Problem
“To The Rescue”
Solution
Create Vivid
“Word Pictures”
That Appeal To
The Senses!
10
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 625 --

For dinner, all the TENDERNESS the two of you can handle – if you
choose the specialty of the house: an entrée of melt-in-your-mouth tender
veal on a bed of angel hair pasta, with a to-die-for pesto sauce… or your
choice of five other wonderful entrees.
Any choice from our dessert tray…
Espresso…
And finally a heart shaped box with four delicate, Italian gelato filled
chocolates presented to your lady with a flourish!
Now, is that an evening to enjoy, to luxuriate in, to remember? Will
that make you a hero? Ah – Giorgio GUARENTEES it.
We can only accommodate twelve couples each evening with this very
special Romance Dinner, so it’s important to call and make reservations as
early as you can. Ask for me – Giorgio Noon to 10:00 P.M. (or stop in for
our Businessman’s lunch), See me, and make these Romance arrangements
personally. I’m the handsome looking devil in the deep blue tuxedo jacket,
in the lounge.
Awaiting your commands – to make ‘a magic for you!
Giorgio.
PS: The cost? EVERYTHING, the entire Romance Dinner for two exactly
as
I’ve described is just $59.95. If you wish you can even pay in advance with
VISA, MASTERCARD, AMERICAN EXPRESS or CARTE BLANCHE and
not
be troubled by a check the evening you are here.
Really Make
Them See,
Smell And
Taste It!
Limited
Number
Available

RESTAURANT
The Now-famous “Giorgio Letters"- Letter 2 	COPYRIGHT FREE
April 24th
Dear Husband,
As you can see, I’ve attached 3 shiny pennies to this letter. I’ve done
this for two important reasons: first, to grab your attention for just a
moment or two or three. Second, to remind you of that wonderful romantic…
song “three Coins In The Fountain…”
You see, this is your second notice.. your romance wake-up call from
me, Giorgio, the Romance Director at Giorgio’s Italian Grotto. My bell tolls-
does it toll for thee?
It is a stress-filled, busy, hectic, tough, tiring, demanding, mind-
numbing, energy-sapping battle each and every day out there, isn’t it? I
know – after all, I am a businessman too. (And a husband too – married to my
beautiful Isabella for 25 years.) It is easy, tempting, even natural to come
home to “the cave” after a day of doing battle, shove the rock onto the
doorway, and collapse onto the couch. BUT WITHOUT FREQUENT
ROMANCE,
THE FLAME FLICKERS AND DIES. You know that, deep down inside—
but
who has the time and energy to create romance?
Giorgio to the rescue!!!
You know, I am deeply disappointed that I didn’t hear from you after
my first letter and invitation to let me create a truly romantic, memorable
evening for you and your lady. So, I am here again, this time with an EVEN
BETTER INVITATION… a truly remarkable offer...
For just $59.95, I will give you everything I described before, the
romantic dinner For Two – listed again, at the bottom of this letter – AND I
WILL EEN SEND A “STRETCH” GLEAMING WHITE, FULLY
EQUIPPED
LIMOSUINE RIGHT TO YOUR HOME to pick YOU – the “Prince” and
your
Picture
Of You 	“3 coins in the fountain…”
Attention
Getting
Headline With
Picture
Gimmick
Problem
Agitate Problem
Irresistible Offer
12
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 12 of 625 --

“Princess” up – and bring you home at the end of the evening! (Imagine the
look in her eyes when you walk out the door and, instead of going to the
garage, your tuxedoed chauffer steps forward and opens the door of the
limousine for your lady to ender!)
If you say “no” to this invitation – ah, is there no romance in your
heart? How can this be?
Call ME, Giorgio, right now. I’m ready to make a’ magic for you!
Giorgio.
With a song in his heart.
HERE IS EVERYTHING INCLUDED FOR THE INCREDIBLE LOW
PRICE OF JUST $59.95

RESTAURANT
The Now-famous “Giorgio Letters"- Letter 3 	COPYRIGHT FREE
May 1st
Dear Husband,
This is Giorgio. Too blue to cry. Disappointed.
Attached are two previous copies of the two previous letters I recently sent you,
extending my very special invitation, to let me create a magical, romantic evening for
you and your loving wife. Maybe you missed them, please read now.
Hoping I might still here from you,
Giorgio.
Picture
Of You
“Hear that lonesome
whippoorwill – he sounds too
blue to cry.”
Attention
Getting
Headline With
Picture

RETAIL STORES
Basic 3 Letter Campaign – Letter 1
COPYRIGHT FREE
Photo
An important message from
Bob Dayton to any
Family Man who
"can't believe the
Price of clothes these days"
Dear "Dad,"
You're right. The cost of your business suits, sports jackets and slacks have crept up-
but that's nothing compared to the costs of keeping clothes on your kids' backs! Fifty bucks for a
pair of jeans ... what are they made of? 14 KT denim? Then the kids outgrow the clothes every
time you blink.
Well, I do have a helpful suggestion. 	At Dayton’s, we offer a unique "Family Plan
discount" that can provide savings of 15% to 25%, even from our already low seasonal sale
prices. All things considered, you may save as much as HALF on top-quality, even designer-
name fashions for men, women and children.
I promise you: you cannot match our combination of quality and overall savings, even at
the national-chain discount stores. And we provide FREE TAILORING.
Right now, we have “special selection” of teens’ denims, sport shirts, jackets, even
licensed-character sweatshirts on sale.
It’s this simple – if you aren't a Dayton’s customer, you're paying too much for your
family's clothes.
I want you to see for yourself what a great selection of fashions, great staff, great service
and great prices we offer- so, a friendly "bribe":
Bring this letter and your family in and browse, and whether you purchase anything or
not, you'll leave with your choice of these FREE GIFTS:
• 	A faux-diamond 10-CT Tennis Bracelet for Mom
• 	A red-white-and-blue sturdy canvass, tennis-style duffel bag you’ll find a dozen uses for,
or your son will grab.
16
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 16 of 625 --

• 	A Cartoon Video featuring the famous "Teenage Mutant Turtles AND a FREE Video
Rental Coupon from Blockbuster
I have a limited supply of these gifts and have to reserve the right to withdraw this offer
without notice. But if you stop in no later than next Saturday, I'm sure there'll be enough
gifts so you can have your choice.
See you soon,
Bob Dayton
Dayton's Discount Clothiers
17
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 17 of 625 --

RETAIL STORES
Basic 3 Letter Campaign – Letter 2
COPYRIGHT FREE
Photo
Dear "Dad,"
Maybe you've been busy,
Out in the backyard,
Shaking the Money Tree...
About ten days ago, I sent you a letter about our "Family Plan Discounts" and Get
Acquainted Free Gift Offer -I'm sorry you and your family haven't dropped in for a visit.
(Actually, it's more of a "tour", considering the incredible selection and variety of fashions we
have for every member of your family.)
Anyway, due to the tremendous response I did receive to that letter, I've rushed in
another supply of FREE GIFTS, and you can still have YOUR CHOICE of a lady's faux-
diamond tennis bracelet OR the tri-color DUFFEL BAG or THE Teenage Mutant Turtles
Cartoon Video with free video rental coupon from Blockbuster. 	Just drop in and look around.
There’s no obligation. 	NEVER and "pressure."
This FREE OFFER expires, though, on the date stamped below in red ink.
Bob Dayton
Dayton’s Discount Clothiers
PS: If you register for our Family Plan while you're here, I'll even waive the regular $19.95
Annual Fee, issue your Membership Number on-the spot so you can save starting right now, and
give you your new Member Gift: a $100.00 Coupon Book with discounts and 2-for-1's with
area dry cleaners, a car wash, several restaurants, and other merchants.
PPS: The faux-diamond tennis bracelet looks so real it might even fool a jeweler! It really is
beautiful. 	Your wife'd love having it. OR the duffel bag, well, you 'II find a zillion uses for it ...
if you can keep your kids from snatching it. OR you can keep your kids happy for a couple
hours with those Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles' exploits on Video- and pick up a move for
yourself from Blockbuster, free. YOUR CHOICE of these gifts, FREE, just for coming in and
getting acquainted.
OR- ASK HOW YOU CAN GET ALL THREE FREE!
18
www.getwsodownload.com

RETAIL STORES
Basic 3 Letter Campaign – Letter 3
COPYRIGHT FREE
Photo
WARNING!
"Sheriff Bob" Is Going To
Issue Your ARREST WARRANT
(For abuse of family finances )
If You Don't Appear
In The Next 7 Days
Attached are copies of the two letters I recently sent you, inviting you to save a bundle on
clothing for your entire family- and offering you a choice of free gifts just for coming in and
seeing for yourself how Dayton’s can help you and your family look sharp, for less.
Have you been out-of-town?
Do you REALLY have a 'money tree' out back?
Are you in the witness protection program, hiding out?
Seriously, I hate to see a Family Man (like me) stretch the household budget
unnecessarily. Clothing prices ARE high. But VALUE is the real issue. And I know, if I can
just get you to come in to Dayton’s one time, you'll be back again and again, to shop and save
with our Family Plan. (92% of all our new customers last year became repeat customers. Over
80% referred friends, neighbors or co-workers. That has to tell you something.)
So, here I am, making a pest out of myself, urging you to drop in anytime within the next
7 days, browse, sign up for our Family Plan FREE, and claim a FREE GIFT, too.
Thanks,
Bob Dayton
Dayton Discount Clothiers
PS: Here are a couple comments from customers just like you:
"xxvcxgxcvxcvxvxcvxcvxvxvxcvxvxcvxcvxcvxvxcvxcbxcbxcvxcvxb." Asdf;lkads;lkasdskjdf.
"Asdflkasdvlkjasd;lkjnm.asdkvsdflkjlzxxz;vlkjzxckjzxlvlkjlvzx;lkzxcvlkjzxcvjl." Asd;lkjadsf.

Or Irresistible Offer] Ends Immediately On [Insert Deadline]….

anywhere else in [insert location]. 	That way you can sleep easier
knowing you [insert big benefit or promise that solves pain or scratches
an itch.]

quantity or quality of your stock…specifically focusing on rare or hard-to-
find items your prospects would love to own]

makes the prospect the “hero” in the eyes of other people…]

Lead-Gen E-mail Template
SUBJECT: 	Get [
Insert Irresistible Offer] Good Until [
Insert Date]…
Dear (insert first name),
If you’ve been [
insert frustrating pain they’re going through
or something they need] then you need to read every
single word of this email.
We’re going to do something our competitors in [
insert
town name] will NEVER consider in a million years and we’d
hate to see a [
insert target prospect] like you miss out!
For a limited time, we’re going to give you [
insert savings or
irresistible offer] that’s sure to [
insert whom they’ll impress
and how, like their wife will love it or their kids will like playing
with it].
You can learn more about it here:
(insert link to squeeze page)
This is sure to 	[
insert big emotional benefit the prospect will get,
like attracting more women, feeling more confident, remove
a pain, or fulfill a desire they’ve always had].
And you won’t have to deal with
[insert common problems
your prospects have to go through to get your item, like high
prices, dealing with bad customer service, etc.]
But you only have until
[insert deadline]; otherwise, you’ll
kick yourself when you miss this and regret not getting [
insert
the amazing savings or offer] and feel guilty for missing out.
So don’t delay, head on over to:
(insert link to squeeze page)

RETAIL STORES
Customer Thank You Letter
COPYRIGHT FREE
Photo
Dear:
Thanks So Very Much
For shopping At My
Shoe Store This Week!
I wanted to make sure to write and thank you for your recent purchase from my store here
at Summit Mall. I believe this was your first purchase from our store and I certainly hope it will
be the first of many!
We pride ourselves on the number of 'customers for life' we have here - men and
women, moms and dads and children who rely on us for ALL their footwear needs.
It so happens that a good friend of mine, Charlie Sudz, owns the Bright 'N Clean Car
Wash just down the street from the Mall. As a little token of my appreciation for your business,
I've arranged for you to get a FREE HOT WAX AND NEW CAR SCENT the next time you
get your car washed at Charlie's- just print your name and address in the spaces below and give
this letter to the Attendant at Charlie's.
Thanks again for your business.
Your new friend,
Al, "The Shoe Man"
28
www.getwsodownload.com

RETAIL STORES
Birthday Letter
COPYRIGHT FREE
Photo
Hey There!
You Didn't Think 	We'd
Forget Your Birthday 	-
Did You?
Dear 	_
HAPPY BIRTHDAY TO YOU!
HAPPY BIRTHDAY TO YOU!
I've enclosed a little booklet of cartoons titled "You're Not Getting Older – You're
Getting Better." I hope you get a kick out of it.
Also enclosed is a SAVINGS CERTIFICATE good for $10.00 OFF any pair of
sports, walking, or Penn-Brand casual shoes in our store. You can redeem it anytime this
month.
Your friend,
Al, "The Shoe Man"

-- 43 of 625 --

Dear Unhappy Sleeper,
Thanks for spending your time with us today. We truly appreciate the opportunity to help improve
your health and well-being through the investment of a new mattress. Hopefully you tested some incredible
mattresses and we were able to provide you with sound sleep advice. We appreciate that not every
mattress shopper will buy during their first visit to Gardnerʼs. However, weʼd love to be the store you trust
when you make your buying decision.
Please let us know how we can earn your business when you are ready.
We understand that the mattress buying process can be overwhelming and confusing. We also
recognize that as a smart, informed consumer you will research products in other stores. If questions arise
as a result of further product exploration and you wish to tap into our expertise, please donʼt
hesitate to call (717) 299-6228 or email me directly at ben@gardnersmattress.com. I know it sounds
cliché, but Gardnerʼs is truly on your side and weʼd love to be your “second opinion.”
There are many similarities that exist in most mattresses and often what separates one from the next
is a label, some fabric, and deceptive marketing, which saddens us.
We wrote a book to help you with this process, did you get a copy?
Our book “Whatʼs Keeping You Up at Night, A Guide to Overcoming Common Mattress Buying
Mistakes” was produced with you in mind and you should read it. It is a really helpful tool in your
search for a better nightʼs sleep. If you didnʼt pick one up, download it at www.LancasterSleepExperts.com.
Use us a trusted second opinion. Our knowledge base, experience, and
product mix is second to none.
Our mattresses Tempur-Pedic, iComfort, PureLatex Bliss and Aireloom are heavily researched by our
customers like you. We have to be informed and represent out products with integrity. Why? Because
these brands (Tempur-Pedic, iComfort, PureLatex Bliss, and Aireloom) are the same from top to bottom in
construction, design, feature, and price no matter which store you choose to buy from.
830 Plaza Blvd (Behind Park City Mall) /// GardnersMattressAndMore.com /// 717-299-6228	44
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 44 of 625 --

We earn our customers business because they trust us to help
them wake up happy and pain free.
We are the only store to offer a “Dream Room”. The “Dream Room” at Gardnerʼs Mattress & More is
a private mattress testing room designed to allow you a unique, private, and comfortable opportunity to “try
before you buy”.
We understand how big of a purchase this is for you. We also understand the importance of
getting a great nightʼs sleep and we donʼt want to see you make an expensive mistake buying the wrong
mattress. Well, hereʼs your chance to do it right. To set up a Dream Room reservation, call (717) 299-6228
or learn more at GardnersMattressAndMore.com/DreamRoom.
When you purchase from Gardnerʼs not only do you support
local business, but you support 132 manufacturing jobs right here
in Lancaster County!
The prices at Gardnerʼs are competitive, our selection of premium and value sleep products is
unparalleled, and our service is superior. You have my word. Weʼd love to be the mattress store of choice
for you and your family. Again, please let us know how we may earn your business.
To your improved health through better sleep,
Ben McClure, Owner
830 Plaza Blvd (Behind Park City Mall) /// GardnersMattressAndMore.com /// 717-299-6228
PS 	- 	Here are a few questions to ask yourself when making your decision,
1 - Can you test the mattress in private BEFORE you buy?
2 - Have pillows been matched to your sleep needs and position?
3 - Does the mattress you are testing solve specific health issues such as back, hip and
shoulder pain?
4 - Have you been offered a mattress protector that will keep your mattress clean & dust mite
free?
5 - Have you discussed sheet sets that fit the depth of your new mattress and are
guaranteed to stay on?
6 - Is the price of the mattress only good for today only forcing you to make a hasty decision?
If so, RUN AWAY!
7 - Is there a hassle-free comfort guarantee, or a guarantee thats cost you an arm and a leg
to use?

Section 2
Professional
Practice
Professional practices contain those who
provide services to the consumer, such as
Dentists, Lawyers, Chiropractors, Doctors,
and more.

The Professional Practice
Basic 3-Letter Plant The Farm Sequence - Letter 1
COPYRIGHT FREE
Just A Quick Letter to Introduce Myself
And, I Have An Important
FREE GIFT Reserved For You.
Dear Neighbor,
My name is Doctor John Subluxation, and my office is just a few miles East of the Oak Hills
community, on Route 3. 	I'm pleased to tell you that many families living in Oak Hills, your
neighbors, have been relying on our office for years. I'd like us to get acquainted too.
Research done for a recent article in Time Magazine indicates that l in 20 Americans consulted
with a Doctor of Chiropractic last year. There are two reasons why I'm calling that to your
attention:
Reason #1: If you or a family member ever suffers from back or
neck pain, you need to choose the right Doctor to help.
(Choosing the wrong Doctor might prolong the suffering
and increase the cost.)
The "l in 20" statistic shows that Chiropractic is gaining ever-increasing recognition as THE best
approach to treating back and neck pain, including everything from an accident injury to
unexplained chronic nagging pain. I specialize in treating such conditions, have 19 years'
experience you can trust, and have helped thousands of people, including many of the employees
at the nearby Ford factory, professional athletes, even rodeo cowboys!
You'll find more information about me in my ad, in the Yellow Pages, on Page 6023.
Reason #2: Back and neck pain should NEVER be ignored.
Back and neck pain represents one of the most common, least understood ailments. 	It causes
more people to lose time at work, for example, than anything else, other than the common cold.
But, unlike the cold, it may not just "go away." People often "ignore it," but that can actually be
dangerous. Back and neck pain may be an important warning signal from your body of something
that will get worse if ignored. 	On the other hand, many causes of such pain ….even if that pain
has been reoccurring off and on for years ... can be eliminated through appropriate chiropractic
care in a very short time.
A Beneficial FREE Service For You
114
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 114 of 625 --

I don’t want you to every ignore such a warning signal because you don’t know where to go, who
to consult - so, should or anyone in your family have back or neck pain, we will gladly offer you
a 100% FREE EXAM, to determine whether or not we can help you, to determine the
cause of your problem. And, incidentally, it's a good idea to get a spinal health check-up once a
year.
The Free Gift Booklet I have Reserved For You
Will Give You New Power Over Stress, Too
I’ve also reserved, as a FREE GIFT for you, an interesting, practical, full-color booklet about
PREVENTING STRESS. 	Stress is something you and I can manage, to prevent future health
problems AND to make everyday living more enjoyable.
To get your FREE BOOKLET, just drop by our office anytime. While you're here, if you like,
take a quick 5-minute tour, although that's not required. Or just call in and we'll mail the
booklet to you. You'll discover some simple things you can do to reduce the stress of today's
fast-paced life.
Sincerely,
John Subluxation D.C.

least $170.

Dr. Dentman, you qualify for a free exam and free x-rays.
Come in and try us on for size. We know you’ll find our staff friendly and Dr.
Dentman incredible at alleviating chronic back and neck pain.
When you first arrive, you’ll fill out some paperwork to give us some
background. Next, Dr. Dentman will sit down with you to chat about your history and why you’re here.
Then he’ll give you a complete comprehensive examination which will include x-rays. This will give a full
picture of what’s going on so Dr. Dentman can give you a comprehensive treatment plan.
Simply call 123-456-7890 and schedule your appointment today or fill out your contact information
below and we’ll have one of our staff contact you during business hours. Call NOW to schedule your
FREE Exam.

Dear Small Business Owner,

business owner, are already the governments' #I tax target.

attention- AND YOUR money. Now you are even paying the highest price

one thing and one thing only: it is going to get worse, not better ... unless you
discover a few secrets normally used only by the big guys to fight back!

The Problem! 	your back - you're paying for the multi-millionaires' yachts, girls and play-time too.

Most will.

John Numbercruncher, C.P.A.

Dispel Doubts

Dear Neighbor,
Just a Quick Letter To Introduce
Myself And, I Have An Important
FREE GIFT Reserved For You.
My name is Jane Smith, I'm a Licensed Massage Therapist and my office, "America's
Best Massages," is only about 5 minutes away from you (Home/apartment
complex/neighborhood), on West Texas Lane, across the street from the Foxboro Hotel, almost
at I-28.
I'm pleased to tell you that many of your neighbors have been relying on me for stress
reduction and therapeutic massage for quite some time. (I've been in practice since 1986,
incidentally.)
drugs.
WHY DO PEOPLE GO TO MASSAGE THERAPISTS?
HOW MIGHT YOU BENEFIT FROM THERAPEUTIC MASSAGE?
Reason #1: As a natural, better response to stress or pain than aspirin and other pills and
Reason #2: As an effective means of improving circulation, replacing fatigue with
renewed energy, and relieving stress and tension.
Reason #3: Relieving pain from weekend athletics. Golfers, tennis players and bowlers
often say that regular massage even improves their game, thanks to improved flexibility, range of
motion and pain-free movement.
Increased circulation is one the main benefits of massage - with certain massage
techniques, I can enhance the delivery of vital oxygen and nutrients to your body's tissues ...
speed up your body's removal of wastes and toxins ... and replace fatigue with energy.
Release of muscular tension is another wonderful benefit of massage therapy. During your
massage, there is a release of 'endorphins'--- your body's own, internal, natural pain-killers
---relaxes muscles, calms nerves, releases pent-up stress. Business people frequently report
clearer-thinking and more energy as a result of massage therapy.
WHAT IS THERAPEUTIC MASSAGE LIKE?
Depending on your needs, I use therapeutic Swedish massage, acupressure (not
puncture), Reiki, and other techniques ... for a full-body massage ... for either a half-hour or an
hour. Your massage takes place in a 100% private, comfortably appointed, soothingly dim lit
130
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 130 of 625 --

room. Our office, incidentally, looks and "feels" very much like a doctor's office. And,
incidentally, every Licensed Massage Therapist has at least 6 years education and training, and is
typically very knowledgeable about anatomy, the circulatory system, and the spine. In addition,
I have over 15 years of experience.
I am a professional. 	Your massage experience is professional in every way. It is also
very relaxing and enjoyable.
Incidentally, many medical doctors, chiropractors and physical therapists refer patients
from auto or at-work accidents, sports injuries, and various other situations to me for therapeutic
massage. (And we accept insurance assignment in most of these cases.)
THIS LETTER ENTITLES YOU TO A 15-MINUTE FREE CONSULTATION, STRESS

a quick, 15-minute consultation and seated massage demonstration. 	OR, if you prefer, you may
take a $10.00 discount from the fee for a full hour-long massage.
A FREE BOOKLET THAT I'VE RESERVED FOR YOU
WILL GIVE YOU NEW POWER OVER STRESS, TOO.
Whether you schedule a massage appointment or not, I'd urge you to at least stop in, say
hello, and pick up your FREE COPY of a very useful booklet on conquering Stress. It's free,
there's no obligation.
Stress, incidentally, is something you shouldn't ignore. Aches, pains, frequent
headaches, frequent muscle tenseness, daily fatigue, frequent stomach problems --- these are
“warning signals” from your body to you. Your body is warning you that it is being abused, not
getting the release and relaxation it needs. Silencing this message with aspirin, sleeping pills,
and other drugs is not the answer. Therapeutic massage is a better, natural, drug-free, benefit-
laden approach. Try it! And there are other, surprisingly simple things you can do for yourself,
at home, to relieve stress - all discussed in this Free Booklet.
Sincerely,
Jane Smith, Licensed Massage Therapist - LMT

circumstances, work, etc. and I'll be able to tell you more about how massage can specifically
benefit you.

WHY DO PEOPLE GO TO MASSAGE THERAPISTS?
HOW MIGHT YOU BENEFIT FROM THERAPEUTIC MASSAGE?

best: mentally and physically fit, clear-headed, calm, in control, able to handle lots of stress ...
and therapeutic massage can help a lot!

pills and drugs. (Or alcohol.) 	An hour of massage is much, much, much better and more
effective than 'happy hour!'

renewed energy, and relieving stress and tension. Increased circulation is one of the main
benefits of massage - with certain massage techniques, I can enhance the delivery of vital
oxygen and nutrients to your body’s tissues ... speed up your body’s removal of waste and toxins
... replace fatigue with energy.

massage, there is a release of 'endorphins' ---your body's own, internal, natural pain-killers
--- relaxes muscles, calms nerves, releases pent-up stress.

vitality to spare, putting an end to frequent headaches or stomach pain, even having increased
“stamina” and “drive,” all as a result of my therapeutic messages! (Weekend athletes- golfers,
tennis players and bowlers say that regular massage improves their game, too - with improved
flexibility, range of motion and pain-free movement.)

Dear Business Neighbor,
"EVEN MY KNOTS HAVE KNOTS ...”
As you can see, I've attached a piece of string tied in a knot and a dollar bill to this letter.
I've done this for three important reasons.
1. Obviously, to get your attention. 	About two weeks ago, I wrote to you, to introduce
myself, and to talk about the benefits business people get from my therapeutic
massage. I haven't heard from you, so I wanted to work harder at getting your
attention this time.
2. 	The string-in-a-knot represents the "knots" every businessperson I know seems to get
- in the neck, shoulders, back ... entrepreneurial stress ... attacking the body, sapping
energy, making it impossible for you to look and feel your best, to do your best. I can
take care of those knots.
3. 	The dollar bill is to remind you that all the wealth and success in the world loses its
value for the businessperson who sacrifices his health in the pursuit! Also, you can use
this dollar for EITHER a 15-minute stress consultation and seated massage
demonstration OR a $10.00 Discount on a full hour massage ... but you must respond
no later than the date stamped at the bottom of this letter, in red ink. (This is a limited
time, get acquainted offer for my business neighbors.)
My office is only about 5 minutes from yours. Why not call and make an appointment
now, while this is fresh in your mind. YOU DESERVE IT. And you'll be amazed at the
benefits you'll experience from my therapeutic massage.
Sincerely,

at work, play or in an auto accident ... is under considerable stress ... complains of headaches,
neck or back pain, or insomnia ... please do them and me the favor of telling them about the
benefits of therapeutic massage.
It IS important to interrupt the vicious cycle of stress. Otherwise, the greater the nerve
pressure, the tighter the muscles become. Headaches occur more often. Sleeplessness occurs
more often, etc. Therapeutic massage is the natural, drug-free, side effect free, pleasant way to
interrupt this negative cycle and let the body heal itself.

THIRD AND FINAL NOTICE FOR:
Optional Paragraph #1- Version “A”:
You missed your most recently scheduled appointment and have not re-scheduled, and I
am concerned about this. Let me tell you why:
Optional Paragraph #1 - Version “B”:
why:
I haven't seen you in over six weeks, and I am concerned about this. Let me tell you
There are two big reasons:
First, if I or anyone here on staff at "America's Best Massages" has done anything to make
you feel uncomfortable ... if we have not made it convenient for you to come in ... if anything is
"wrong" with our services, I want to know about it. We really do strive for excellence, but we
also know that there's always the possibility of having erred; always room for improvement. If
there is something we've done that has kept you from continuing with regular therapeutic
massage, please let me know by letter, phone or in person.
Second, we did determine that you have conditions very appropriate for therapeutic
massage. The best benefits come from a regular schedule. 	And, ignoring the body's “ warning
signals” often leads to gradual worsening of the pain or stress.
I can only guess at why you may have "dropped out"-
1. 	Your own hectic schedule. Making time every week or even every two weeks for
your massage therapy may be difficult, and I can understand that. The busyness of
life these days really is amazing. However, if you sacrifice your health, whatever else
you gain will pale in importance. 	Let's work this out. We can set up your
appointments from 9 to 5 Monday through Friday OR, if necessary, evening or
Saturday appointments are available. If you'd like us to call a day ahead and remind
you of your next appointment, we’ll be glad to do that.
138
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 138 of 625 --

2. 	You pain went away. That happens- but remember that temporary relief of a
specific pain is not the only reason for continuing with massage therapy. Just because
the pain has gone away does not mean that the underlying cause of the problem has
been taken care of. More time is usually needed for that. And pain relief is just one
part of achieving the best possible health and vitality. There are many good reasons for
regular therapeutic massage, including:
A. A natural, side-effect-free response to stress, headaches, "computer screen
neck pain," back pain, etc. - instead of pills, drugs.
B. Improves circulation. Every cell in the body is dependent on blood and lymph
flow to provide oxygen and nutrients, and to eliminate metabolic waste.
Massage increases circulation, assisting and speeding up these processes.
This means the body performs with better efficiency; resists or recovers from
disease, injury or exceptionally arduous activity; and quite simply, makes you
feel better, be more productive. Many longevity experts believe that massage
therapy enhances youthful appearance, younger looking skin, helps you look
and feel younger that your years.
C. Replaces fatigue with energy. If you are frequently tired ... "drained" at day's
end ... you'll find that regular therapeutic massage can make a big, positive
difference.
D. Release of muscular tension. During massage, there is a release of
“endorphins” --- your body's own, natural pain-killers. This relaxes
muscles, calms nerves, and diffuses built-up stress.
E. Somebody said to you - “What? 	You're going to a massage place?" I'm
sorry to say that many people still do not understand what a Licensed Massage
Therapist is all about ... how well educated we are, how thoroughly accepted
by the medical chiropractic communities, and how beneficial our services can
be. Some view massage as a foolish luxury, but they couldn't be further from
the truth. Please don't let their ignorance deprive you of something this
beneficial and important.
F. 	You're concerned about the cost. I can only urge you to consider this an
important investment in your health and well-being. The cost for a full hour's
massage every week divides out to about $5.00 a day, less if you use our
Coupon Book Program. About the same as a Big Mac, fries and coke ... two
drinks at 'happy hour' ... and other purchases we give little thought to, that do
us little, if any good! We accept VISA, MasterCard and American Express
for your convenience. 	With our Coupon Book Program, you can save 20%.
Or, with a 1-Year: 24 Massage Pre-Pay, you can save 30%.
I AM CONCERNED ABOUT YOU, and hope to hear from you very soon, to schedule
your next appointment.
Sincerely,
PS: I thought the enclosed article might be of interest to you, also.

The Bryley Birthday unconverted 3-letter sequence has been used every year since 2007, with
slight modifications to match Bryley’s age (he was 6 in 2007 when we first started this
campaign).
The ROI has ranged from a low of 20:1 to a high of 78:1. It has brought in from just over
$20,000 to almost $40,000 each time we’ve used this campaign.
143
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 143 of 625 --

Hi mister or misses patient,
My name is Bryley and my daddy is Dr. Bergh. 	He
told me you came in to see him to talk about
crooked teeth, but haven’t done anything about it
yet. 	My daddy says you wanted to think about
getting a beautiful smile and have not decided if you
want that or not.
Well, my birthday is March 23rd and I’ll be seven years old. 	I’m so
excited this year my birthday is on Easter. 	My parents are taking
me someplace special but haven’t told me where I’m going yet.
I told my daddy that I wanted to celebrate my 7th birthday with
all his friends at his office. 	I thought a good way to celebrate was
to have my daddy give you a present from me.
So during the month of March, my daddy will take 7 percent off
your treatment. 	But since my birthday is in March, he won’t be
able to continue this special deal past March 31st.
Be sure to call my daddy at (818) 242-1173 today to get your
present from me. 	Just mention my name, Bryley, for your 7
percent price reduction. 	You’ll be glad you did, and so will I.
Sincerely yours,
Bryley Bergh
PS. 	Here are my two dogs Rex and Scamp.
They were born the day after Christmas and are very fun to play
with. 	Oh yeah, my big sister Kaigan was also born the day after
Christmas.
144
www.getwsodownload.com

Rex and Scamp Bergh here. We were out playing with

run as fast as we could to get it, trying to beat each
other there. Oh sorry, we just got sidetracked like we
always do.
Anyway, Bryley mentioned that you hadn’t called his daddy, Dr. Bergh (our
great-master) for your
birthday bash discount of 7 percent. Bryley told us
how important a beautiful and healthy smile is to you and we just can’t
figure out why you haven’t called.
All we can figure is that you got sidetracked (like we often do) with your
daily chores, work, projects, etc. 	We want to be sure you get the smile of
your dreams, because as you know, there aren’t many things more
important than feeling good about yourself and being able to smile and
laugh without any concerns.
Our master, Bryley, loves to smile and laugh. He also
loves making people happy. We think he wants to be a
clown, although he’s talking about being an orthodontist
just like his daddy and grand-daddy.
Be sure to call our great-master Dr. Bergh at (818) 242-1173 today to start
your orthodontic treatment and receive your 7 percent Bryley’s birthday
bash discount. The deadline for this deal is quickly approaching. Bryley’s

Dear Mr. or Mrs.,
You'll notice I've attached a $300.00 "bill" from The United Bank of Bryley. Well,
that's me, Bryley, and 1 bet you're wondering why I've sent this coupon to you. Please
let me explain.
I've been watching the presidential candidates campaign, and frankly I'm confused at this
point. There's one who is older with more experience, and one who is younger who says
he wants to change everything. Well, I think-that in order to change or for things to get
better, you have to feel good about yourself.
And one of the biggest things to help you feel good about yourself is to be happy with
your smile.
My dad, Dr. Brian Bergh, said you came in to talk to him about your dream smile, but
you haven't decided whether you want that yet or not. Now, I'm not sure if you just
don't want the smile of your dreams right now, or if you're concerned about the economy
like a lot of people.
Well, I talked to my dad and convinced him to try and help you as much as he can. And
since I'm thinking about running for president when I get older (see I'm only 7 right now
and you have to be 35 to run for president), I thought it'd be good to start practicing
ASAP.
I noticed that President Bush sent a check to a lot of Americans, calling it an economic
stimulus package or something like that. So, I've included a "check" that you can use at
my dad's office. It's worth $300 towards your orthodontic treatment. Don't try to use it
anywhere else, 'cause you might get in trouble, and then I'd feel bad and have to give
you a pardon.
The presidential election is November 4th, and my dad said that after November 3rd you
really can't campaign any longer. So the $300 coupon is only good until November 3rd.
So call (818) 242-1173 today and speak with Sharon and let her know you want to start
getting your dream smile. And be sure to call before November 3, 2008.
Sincerely yours,
BryJey Bergh
.S. Call Sharon today at (818) 242-1 ]73 to get started on your way to your dream smile.
During tougher times, the better you feel about yourself, the more successful you will be.

Dear Friend,
Recently, my son, Bryley, sent you a letter and a postcard offering you $300 off your orthodon-
tic treatment at Braces By Bergh. We still haven't heard from you, and Bryley knows how im-
portant it is for you or your child to have the smile of your dreams. In fact, he loves to smile so
much that it just makes sense he wants you to feel good about your smile, too.
Now, Bryley is a character. He’s such a good boy, and he feels very strongly about your suc-
cess. Did you know that people with beautiful smiles are more successful than those who don’t
have such a great smile?
It’s coming down to the wire, and in about a week, we’ll know who our next president will be.
This will be an historic election regardless of who wins.
And as you know, Bryley is only 7 years old right now, so technically he’s not able to run for
President of the United States. But give him time and he’ll do a great job for you.
And how can you resist that smile. You can bet he’ll have braces on soon to help him get his
dream smile. Why not you or your child? After all, even in today’s economy, having an attrac-
tive smile will help you achieve better results than without. And you’ll feel better about your-
self which will make a huge difference in how you appear to others.
So go ahead and make your vote count. And even though you can’t write Bryley in on the bal-
lot, you can vote for him by using this letter to claim your $300 credit towards orthodontic
treatment in our office. But you must hurry, this offer WILL end on November 3, 2008. Cam-
paigning is not allowed on election day, so your vote for Bryley has to be in by November 3rd.
But don’t wait until the 3rd, call us today at (818) 242-1173.
Neither John McCain nor Barack Obama can give you such an immediate benefit.
Sincerely yours,
Dr. Bergh
Dr. Brian Bergh
P.S. This offer expires on November 3rd, so call today so you don’t miss out!151
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 151 of 625 --

The Cat’s Away 3-step sequence was born after reading Bill Glazer’s Outrageous Advertising
Book. He talked about making money while on vacation, and I though, hmm, how can I do that?
So we put together this 3-step sequence to send to unconverted leads.
The 2nd letter was sent in a brown paper bag with the excuse that if they brought in some candy, I
would extend the deadline and allow them to still receive the bonus.
With the 3rd letter, we actually sent them 2 small candy bars so they could bring those in and still
receive the bonus, trying on our part to reduce any obstacle they might have in not responding to
these letters.
This brought in a 64:1 ROI the first year we did this, most recently, the ROI dropped to 31:1, but
still worth the time and effort to convert our uncoverted leads.
152
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 152 of 625 --

While The Cat’s Away, This Mouse Wants To Play –
And Save You Up To $750 Off Your Or Your Child’s
Orthodontic Treatment.
Dear «Responsible_party_greeting»,
I wanted to get this letter out to you ASAP, because I know you are going
to want to read it and take advantage of this special deal.
Dr. Bergh is going to be out of the office during the week of Labor Day
(September 8th – 10th). Something about a vacation (OOPS, I’m not
supposed to say he’s going to be on vacation, so let’s keep that little slip of
the tongue quiet, OK?).
But anyway, here’s what I’m thinking. Usually when someone is getting
ready to start their orthodontic treatment, Dr. Bergh is in the office
overseeing all the going’s on. 	But since he’s going to be gone during that
whole week, I thought maybe I could sneak some people in and give them
a great deal on their orthodontic treatment. You see, Dr. Bergh really
wants to help you get the smile of your dreams, and I know you’ve been
sitting on the fence about getting started.
So, here’s what I’m thinking. If I can get enough people to sign the
paperwork to get their orthodontic treatment started, Dr. Bergh will be so
pleased, that I can sneak in a discount without him even really knowing.
Now, Dr. Bergh’s a smart guy, but after he’s been gone for a week, a lot of
things pile up – like the mail, messages, etc.
And, also, I know the first day he comes back, we see a few more patients
that day than normal. He’s an important guy around here, and our
patients’ who had a minor concern while he was away need to come in for
him to take a look.
153
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 153 of 625 --

Because he’ll be distracted, I’m sure I could sneak in at least a $500 discount on your
treatment, and for the first 3 people who schedule their appointment I’ll see if I can even
bump that up to $750 – boy, am I taking a risk here!
See, if I can sneak a bunch of these by him on that first day he comes back, then viola!!,
we can skate through unnoticed. And you know what, even if he does notice, he’ll be so
happy you’re finally going to realize your dream smile, he’ll forget all about that.
But, you’ve got to come in to see me between September 8th and 10th or it won’t work.
All you need to do is come in sign the “paperwork,” make your initial payment and then
we’ll set up another appointment to get you started.
So put this letter down right now, and call me at (818) 242-1173 to set up that
appointment between the 8th and 10th of September. I can’t offer it any other time,
because the next time he’s out of the office, I will be, too.
So, don’t delay, call me today at (818) 242-1173 and set up that appointment so you can
get the Cat’s Away secret promotion for your orthodontic treatment.
Sincerely,
Sharon Wadsworth
Treatment Coordinator, Braces By Bergh
P.S. Even if it’s 2 AM in the morning or the weekend when you get this letter, call and
leave a message saying you want take advantage of the Cat’s Away secret promotion!!
P.P.S. Remember, the first 3 people who schedule their appointment will get the full
$750 off their treatment.
P.P.S. Not ready yourself to get started? Do you have a friend or co-worker that you
know wants the smile of their dreams…be a hero and give them this letter. We’ll honor
the $500 off their treatment if they call by September 10th to make their initial
appointment. Be sure they mention the Cat’s Away secret promotion for their special
deal.

Hi, it’s me Sharon, again.
Recently, like just the other day, I sent you a special letter describing my
Cat’s Away special promotion. You did get that letter, didn’t you?
But, I’m surprised I haven’t heard from you yet. And you know what?
We had 4 fast-acting people call over the weekend and leave me a
message to secure their Cat’s Away maximum discount of $750 off their
orthodontic treatment. You’ll remember that I was only going to be able
to offer the full $750 discount to the first 3 people who scheduled their
appointments. I felt so bad for that 4th patient who acted so quickly, that I
ended up giving them the full $750 off their orthodontic treatment.
Now, you’re probably wondering why I’ve sent you this brown paper bag.
You see, I was trying to figure out how I could get Dr. Bergh to agree to
give the full discount to anyone else who schedules their appointment
before September 10th. I’ll explain the paper bag more in just a moment.
I don’t know if you know this or not, but Dr. Bergh just loves chocolate.
So, I figured I could bribe him with some chocolate and not get in trouble
for extending the $750 discount to you in addition to the other 4 people
who already made the decision to get the smile of their dreams.
You can still get the $500, no problem, as long as you schedule your
appointment by September 10th. But if you still want the full $750
discount, I’m going to ask you to bring along some form of chocolate.
Doesn’t have to be much. Dr. Bergh is just as happy with a plain Hershey
bar as he is with something more expensive live Godiva chocolate. Your

choice.
When you call to schedule your appointment, just let me know you’re going to bring in
some chocolate – you can put it in this brown paper bag so I can keep it a secret from the
other girls in the office (you wouldn’t believe how quickly chocolate will disappear from
the office - or maybe you would!!). We wouldn’t want them sneaking it away and
leaving Dr. Bergh without any reason to OK our plan.
So, call me today at (818) 242-1173 and let me know that you want to get started on your
way to your dream smile. We’ll get your paperwork all taken care of, and then schedule
the next appointments to get you started.

Sharon Wadsworth

P.P.P.S. Not ready to start yourself? Be a friend to a friend or family member. Just give
them this letter and paper bag and we’ll extend the same courtesy to them as long as they
call me by September 10th.

Dear «Responsible_party_greeting»,
I know, I know, this is the 3rd letter you’ve received about my Cat’s Away promotion to
start orthodontic treatment at Dr. Bergh’s office. If you haven’t received my other 2
letters, you’d better check with your postal carrier and find out what the deal is. The last
one I sent was in a brown paper lunch bag.
Well, I wanted to send an apology to you, because in my last letter I was asking you to
bring in a piece of chocolate as an “ethical bribe” so Dr. Bergh would OK extending the
full $750 promotional discount on your or your child’s orthodontic treatment.
I got to thinking about why I still haven’t heard from you. This is such a great deal I’ve
set up, and it’s about to end. I mailed this letter on Saturday, so you should be getting it
on Tuesday, September 8th and this great promotion has to end on Thursday, September
10th. That’s because Dr. Bergh is out of the office this week, and I wanted to “sneak” you
in and get you on your way to your dream smile.
The only other reasons I could think of are that you haven’t had time to go get some
chocolate, or that you aren’t sure where to go get some chocolate. In either case, I’ve
solved your problem, because I’ve included some chocolate with this letter.
Now, you can go ahead and eat it, or you can call me at (818) 242-1173 and tell me you
want to get started on your way to your dream smile.
Imagine how you’d feel about yourself with your brand new smile.
And imagine, too, where else 2 small pieces of chocolate could be worth a whopping
$750 to you. And at this time, that’s a whole bunch of moolah!!
So, don’t delay. Call me at (818) 242-1173 as soon as you get this letter and we’ll get
you scheduled to sign all the paperwork and schedule your appointments to get started. I
can’t tell you how many times I’ve had people come in to the office and say how they
wish they had started treatment earlier – in fact, just yesterday we had a patient say she
had thought about her dream smile for 5 (yes, 5) long years. Don’t let time slip away.
Call me today at (818) 242-1173 and get moving forward towards your dream smile.
I’m getting more excited just thinking about it myself.
Call today, and let me know you want to take advantage of the Cat’s Away promotion
and that you’ve got your chocolate ready to go for your full $750 promotional discount.
Sincerely,
Sharon Wadsworth
Sneak Extraordinaire and Chocolate Caretaker

Dear Fellow Business Owner,
As a small business owner and employer of 26, I know how tough things can be in the
current business environment. Business is getting tougher and tougher every day but we have to
keep our employees happy. Do you need to reward your employees this Holiday Season but don’t
have the time or the money to do so? Are you and your employees tired of giving and getting the

about and be truly thankful for.

will save you money off of the retail price of spa services.

-- 175 of 625 --

STRAIGHTENING TEETH HAS COME A LONG WAY.
Braces work. Yet, even though they come in bright colors these days, the brackets and steel wires
still work the same way. Food still gets stuck in them. Flossing and brushing are an adventure. And,
when you’re a teenager sporting a mouthful of metal, easy and confident smiles can be hard to
come by.
ALL SMILES. NO SACRIFICES.
Back when we were teenagers, putting up with the hassles of braces and feeling self-conscious
about wearing them were necessary in order to get the smile you wanted. For today’s teens,
getting through those formative years can be a little tougher. Thankfully, straightening their teeth
with Invisalign TeenTM is a lot easier.
Claim a FREE Copy
of Dr. Burleson’s
Latest Book!
(See Back for Details)
THE ADVANTAGES ARE CLEAR
InvisalignTeen is a series of virtually invisible aligners that gradually straighten your
teen’s teeth. And because they’re removable, proper dental hygiene is a
cinch. Since most people won’t even know your teen is wearing
Invisalign, they’ll have the confidence to keep on smiling. Best of
all, treatment costs about as much as braces, and fewer doctor
visits take up less of your time. Our aligners even include a color-
coded indicator that tells you how long your teen’s been wearing them.
FIND OUT WHY MORE AND MORE MOMS ARE
CHOOSING INVISALIGN TEEN
Choosing how to straighten your teen’s teeth is a big decision. Visit our website to see
what other teenagers and their parents have to say about us. Then take a few moments to
take our Self Assessment together with your teenager.
Invisalign Teen will help give your teenager the confidence
of a great smile—and they’ll love you for it along the way.
Claim Your FREE Copy of
Dr. Burleson’s Latest Book at
www.FreeInvisalignBook.com
DR. DUSTIN BURLESON & ASSOCIATES
4135 N Mulberry Drive

3 Step Direct Mail Campaign
• Message in a Bottle (3D Mailer)
• Postcard, references the 3D mailer
• Sales Letter, references previous mailings
Monthly Cost
$895 - $1,495
New Patients Acquired
12 per month (average)
Return on Investment
15:1
Do You Sometimes Feel
Like You're Stranded on a
Desert Island Not Knowing
How You Can Possibly Fit
Braces Into Your Budget
and Busy Schedule?
Let's face it. Your days are not filled with free time. And braces
aren't getting any cheaper. Those two complaints are the most
common reasons I have found that patients like you will delay
getting braces or Invisalign and instead spend a lifetime with
crooked teeth. Just a few short years ago, fear of pain was
another factor keeping you from the smile of your dreams.
Today, more than ever, a confident smile is important in social settings, school, at
work, and especially when meeting new people. Scientists have determined the
human eye can judge a crooked smile in less than 1 second. People with an
attractive smile have been rated as having more intelligence, higher paying jobs, and
being more friendly. It's not fair to judge a book by its cover, but the truth remains.
Your smile says a lot about you and your social status, your approach to life,
and your confidence. What is your smile saying about you?
Recently you visited our office and spent time with our smile
specialists developing a custom plan for your new smile. We
haven't seen you since then. Frankly, I'm a little concerned. I'm
concerned that you didn't get a question answered or, worse,
you've decided that you cannot afford braces or fit orthodontic
treatment into your busy lifestyle.
I'll cut to the chase. We want you back. I'm so confident that you're
going to love your new smile that I'm giving you the opportunity to
spread your payments over 36 months or longer with 0% interest
and the lowest down-payments I've ever offered.
Why would I do such a thing? To be brutally honest, my accountant
thinks I'm nuts. But I know something he doesn't. I know that
patients who finally make the decision to “get off the sideline” and
take the first step towards a spectacular new smile, the first step
away from living a life with crooked teeth… these
patients come back at the end of treatment and thank
me for changing their lives.

a HUGE problem many people make... ignoring a scary-looking smile!
I’m talking about the hide-your-smile in family photos or lack-of-self-
confidence smile that can secretly hold people back from their full
potential in life.

personal gift certificate, valued at $200.00! 	It’s waiting for
you at the end of this letter, and I created it just for you!
I’m giving you this gift certificate (and cure-all for scary
smiles) to thank you for visiting our office for your initial
consultation and to introduce you to our amazing team of smile
specialists.

(816) 929-6916 before October 31st, when this deal is gone like the
wind on a cool autumn evening.

Dr. B and Team

This Columbus Day has never been a better time to take advantage of the life-long returns of a great
smile. Discover the self-confidence that comes from a straight, healthy smile.
You are receiving this email because I believe you can benefit from braces or Invisalign. You recently
met with one of our treatment coordinators but have not scheduled the next step towards a healthier,
happier you.
Frankly, I'm puzzled.
There are only 3 reasons, in my experience, why people say NO to a lifetime of smiles. I'd like to review
them with you and help you take the next step in improving your smile and the health of your teeth.
1) I can't afford it. With flexible financing, low down payments and a special offer I'm about to make to
you at the end of this email, I think you'll be pleasantly surprised how affordable a new smile can be.
2) I'm too busy. School, work, family activities... it's enough to make your head spin. Luckily, you can
relax at Burleson Orthodontics. With more after-work, and after-school hours than any other office in
Kansas City, your appointments will be something to smile about. Today's technology allows us to see
you every 8-12 weeks during your treatment, reducing the number of orthodontic adjustments by more
than half, compared to older treatment techniques.
3) I should wait until the time is right. Now is the time to take advantage of the most-flexible, most-
convenient, and most-aggressive orthodontic payment plans our industry has ever seen. Gone are the
days of parking your money in a high-yield CD and getting 5 or 6% return on your investment. You are
lucky to get 0.5% return on any dollar sitting in the bank and that means one thing : dollar-for-dollar,
investing in your smile has never been more affordable.
Date: October 8, 2012 12:48:00 PM CDT
To: dustin@burlesonortho.com

-- 182 of 625 --

This is why I'm writing you.
For this special holiday, we celebrate someone who had both vision and courage. Columbus had the
vision to explore uncharted territory and the courage to face his fears. I enjoy reading stories like his and
those of other pioneers and explorers. They make my daily meetings, deadlines, and challenges seem
rather trivial. After all, something like straightening your smile is not as difficult as traveling across the
Atlantic ocean for 5 weeks, powered by nothing but the wind. Your charted course is much smoother.
The journey towards a Spectacular Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics has been traveled by more
than 7,000 patients in the Kansas City area. With customer service ratings above 98%, I think you'll
agree... when you "set sail" with the team of smile specialists at Burleson Orthodontics, you are
partnering with professionals who will make your orthodontic journey a smooth, comfortable voyage.
To be absolutely certain that your orthodontic treatment is so exceptional that it changes your life and
improves your self-confidence so that you can face life smiling, I'm offering you a limited-time opportunity
to Discover a Spectacular Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics. Just like Columbus arrived at his
destination in three ships, you will benefit from three unique, money-saving features to this special
offer:
* Lifetime Guarantee : if for any reason you ever require braces again in the future, even if it's because
you didn't wear your retainer, you pay nothing. We will straighten your teeth again for free, guaranteed.
* Pay 3 Way Option : receive a 5% courtesy for payment in full, split your down-payment into 3 easy
installments, or finance the entire treatment with our trusted resource, Care Credit.
* Take Your Own Voyage : receive a FREE Caribbean Cruise for 2 anytime in the next 3 years as my
special way of saying Thank You and Congratulations on taking the next step towards a Spectacular
Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics.
I'M NOT CRAZY TO MAKE AN OFFER LIKE THIS... but I would be if I didn't limit how many people can
take advantage it. I'm setting the number firmly at 12. If you are not in the group, you can certainly still
take advantage of orthodontic treatment with our office, but the Caribbean Cruise Vacation is off the
table. As of this writing, three patients have already reserved spots in advance.
There are 9 remaining spots.
This offer expires TODAY, Monday, Oct. 8th at 4:59 PM (CST).
Here's How to Sign Up:
1) Call (816) 929-6922 and ask for Ashley.
2) Email me directly at info@burlesonortho.com
3) Fax your name and telephone number toll-free to 866-253-1590
Remember, we're celebrating Columbus Day because he took action. There were countless other
explorers who made their way across the Atlantic and spotted land after Columbus and many who wished
they had, but we don't celebrate a special day in their honor. Make this the day that you take action on
your future. Now is the time.
To your spectacular smile,
Dr. Burleson
P.S. Ashley has been strictly informed to end the Columbus Day Offer at 4:59PM (CST) today. After 5pm,
the Caribbean Cruise vacation is "gone like the wind" and will sail away faster than the Nina, Pinta and
Santa Maria.
P.P.S. For the exceptionally-busy, you can guarantee all of your appointments are scheduled so that you
never miss work or school. Ask about our Platinum Plus program. It's not for everyone and it is expensive
(starting at $7,997). I can't stay at work until 8pm for everyone, but for a select few with schedules that
make a bee-hive seem "calm and quiet" in comparison, you have this option available to you. It does fill
up every month and it does require acceptance into the group by me personally, so if you are interested
in applying for the Platinum Plus program, ask Ashley for details.

CAPTAIN AMERICA:
THE FIRST AVENGER (2011)
Monsters generate their city’s power by scaring children, even though the monsters are terribly afraid of being contaminated by little
kids. Watch what happens when an adorable 2-year old girl sneaks into the monster’s world in this classic, Disney Pixar favorite.
A criminal mastermind named Gru develops a plan with his army of little yellow minions to steal the moon. His plan is interrupted
when he encounters a trio of orphan girls who look at him and see him as a potential dad.
Members of the He-Man Woman Haters Club find out that Alfalfa has fallen
in love with Darla...a girl! Now his pal Spanky has to set him straight before
Alfalfa’s love jeopardizes the club’s chances of winning the big go-kart race.
The peaceful island community of Amity is being terrorized by a Great White
shark. After numerous deaths and a drop in tourism, the police chief, a marine
scientist and a grizzled fisherman set out on an adventure to stop it.
Billy Crystal stars in this hilarious comedy about a city native and his friends having a mid-life crisis
and taking a vacation to the Wild West while driving cattle. The city-goers meet crazy cowboy Curly
who not only teaches them how to become real cowboys, but also about life in the open air of the west.
Katniss Everdeen voluntarily takes her younger sister’s place in the Hunger Games, an annual
televised event in which two teenagers from each of the twelve districts of Panem are chosen at
random to compete and fight to the death.
BRING CHAIRS, BLANKETS AND THE FAMILY FOR AN OUTDOOR MOVIE AT DUSK!
A video game villain is tired of being the bad guy and wants to be a hero. He sets out to
fulfill his dream of being a good guy, but his quest brings havoc to the entire arcade. Families
will fall in love with this ingenious comedy as they recognize many video game favorites.
A theme park on an island full of living dinosaurs suffers a major power outage causing the prehistoric creatures to run free.
Visitors are now facing the adventure of their lives as they try to survive and escape the island.
After being deemed unfit for military service, Steve Rogers volunteers for a top secret research project that turns him into
Captain America: a superhero dedicated to defending the ideals of the USA.
A silent film company transitions into sound, only to discover their leading lady has a not-so-desirable voice. They bring in a
beautiful, aspiring actress to dub her voice which only causes a love triangle disaster. You won’t want to miss Gene Kelly & Debbie
Reynolds in this classic, romantic comedy.

Special President’s Day Offer by Invitation Only
February 1, 2013
Dear Sophia,
I’m writing you this letter in time for President’s Day with a special offer
that even a President would find hard to pass by. 	You might have noticed we
have been giving away a lot of iPad minis around the office for referral
contests, holiday promotions and simply to have some fun!
One of our patients even said “you guys treat me like royalty around here...
I get great service and an iPad mini!?” Needless to say, the iPad mini has
been a big hit. 	In honor of doing things BIG (think Presidential) my staff
encouraged me to give away 12 more iPad minis to the first 12 patients on our
list who pay off their orthodontic balances before 2/28/13 *
Here’s how this works : pay-off your orthodontic
treatment before 2/28/13, and get a FREE iPad Mini!
It’s that easy.
* Personally, I think it’s the staff’s way of avoiding all of the paperwork that is involved in sending monthly bills and
tracking monthly payments for our patients in braces and Invisalign. Or, it could be the satisfaction they get when they
see the look on the face of our patients who have received an iPad mini. Either way, I try to keep them happy. They sure
make my life a lot easier. You might even say they treat me like a President. So, I’m passing the feeling on to you.
Call Sarah or Tara today and tell them you want the Presidential
Treatment. 	They will rush an iPad mini to your door when you pay off
your remaining balance with Burleson Orthodontics. 	You can even put
it on your credit card or Flex Spending debit card *
To your spectacular smile,
Dr. B
Dr. Burleson
Reserve your FREE iPad Mini Today.
Call Sarah at (816) 741- 5311.
P.S. 	Speaking of presidents, your flex spending account has been an issue of
much debate with President Obama and Congress. 	Regardless of where you stand
politically, your flex spending account is going to be limited in 2013 and
beyond. 	Better use it before you lose it.
P.P.S. 	There really are only 12 of these iPads available. 	When they’re gone,
we won’t be holding a presidential debate to see who won & who lost.
First 12 before 2/28/13 at 4:59PM and we’re done. 	That’s an executive order.

From : Sam Burleson (age 5), Dr. Burleson’s son
March 7, 2012
Dear Addressee,
I just wanted to send you a note of thanks. 	You have been a patient of
my dad’s for quite a while now and he tells me you have been a
fantastic to work with! 	It is because of this I wanted to let you in
on an exclusive promotion my dad is offering to a select few of his
very best patients. 	And, he’s doing it just in time for tax day. 	You
know, the day when “Uncle Sam” gives most of us a refund.
I’m only 5… and I’m not an uncle yet… but, I do have the same name as
the guy who is going to send you a tax refund. 	Never missing an
opportunity to celebrate a holiday (even if it’s only tax day), my dad
thought it might be fun if I gave you a gift on the same day Uncle Sam
gives you a tax refund.
Here’s how this works : take advantage of
your tax refund, pay-off your orthodontic
balance, and get a FREE Amazon Kindle
Fire! It’s that easy.
My dad has only authorized twenty patients to receive an Amazon Kindle
Fire for this promotion (that’s all the fingers and toes I have to
count on, after all). 	Don’t wait... my dad says, “just like an
accountant heading for vacation the day after tax day, this deal is
GONE on April 15, 2012.” 	My dad is always saying silly stuff like
that.
Good luck on getting a new Kindle Fire and happy tax day!
To your spectacular smile,
SAM
Sam Burleson (age 5) - Dr. Burleson’s son
Reserve your Amazon Kindle Fire Today.
Call Samantha at (816) 759-0119
P.S. 	Don’t forget to mention this letter when you call. 	I’m not quite
tall enough yet to reach the phone all by myself… so, please ask for
Samantha. 	I want to make certain my dad adds you to the list and you
receive your Amazon Kindle Fire!
P.P.S. 	If you have more than one family member in braces in my dad’s
office, you can take advantage of this offer for each family member!

-- 200 of 625 --

This Labor Day has never been a better time to take advantage of the life-long returns of a great smile.
And there's no hard work involved on your part when you say yes to the self-confidence that comes
from a straight, healthy smile.
You are receiving this email because I believe you can benefit from braces or Invisalign. You recently
met with one of our treatment coordinators but have not scheduled the next step towards a healthier,
happier you.
Frankly, I'm puzzled.
There are only 3 reasons, in my experience, why people say NO to a lifetime of smiles. I'd like to review
them with you and help you take the next step in improving your smile and the health of your teeth.
1) I can't afford it. With flexible financing and low down payments, starting your new smile with Burleson
Orthodontics is a walk in the park. There's no hard work involved on your part at all... something to
celebrate this Labor Day.
2) I'm too busy. School, work, family activities... it's enough to make your head spin. Luckily, you can
relax at Burleson Orthodontics. With more after-work, and after-school hours than any other office in
Kansas City, your appointments will be something to smile about. Today's technology allows us to see
you every 8-12 weeks during your treatment, reducing the number of orthodontic adjustments by more
than half, compared to older treatment techniques.
3) I should wait until the time is right. Now is the time to take advantage of the most-flexible, most-
convenient, and most-aggressive orthodontic payment plans our industry has ever seen. Gone are the
days of parking your money in a high-yield CD and getting 5 or 6% return on your investment. You are
lucky to get 0.5% return on any dollar sitting in the bank and that means one thing : dollar-for-dollar,
investing in your smile has never been more affordable.
This is why I'm writing you.
For this special holiday, we celebrate the social and economic achievements of American workers. My
grandfather was a coal miner in West Virginia, making 25 cents per hour. My father was a small
business owner and my mother a school teacher. They kept a nice home and taught me and my brothers
the value of a dollar. I know firsthand that paychecks don't stretch. They are not big rubber bands. If
you value hard work and run on a budget, like I do, then you know that the investment in your smile or the
smile of your child must be planned out in advance. Just like my parents and grandparents who planned
in advance for family expenses, your comfort and convenience with the cost of braces (not just the
process of straightening your teeth) is something we take very seriously.
The journey towards a Spectacular Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics has been planned out and
made easy for you. It has been traveled by more than 7,000 patients in the Kansas City area. With
customer service ratings above 98%, I think you'll agree... when you set aside the fears or frustrations
that braces are "too expensive" and start your treatment with the team of smile specialists at Burleson
201
www.getwsodownload.com

smile of your child must be planned out in advance. Just like my parents and grandparents who planned

To be absolutely certain that your orthodontic treatment is so exceptional that it changes your life and
improves your self-confidence so that you can face life smiling, I'm offering you a limited-time opportunity
to Say Yes to a Spectacular Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics. Just like the achievements of the
American workers we celebrate this weekend, you can celebrate three major achievements in our office
that have helped more Kansas City patients and parents say yes to orthodontic treatment:
* Lifetime Guarantee : if for any reason you ever require braces again in the future, even if it's because
your child didn't wear his or her retainer, you pay nothing. We will straighten the teeth again for free,
guaranteed.
* Pay 3 Way Option : receive a 5% courtesy for payment in full, split your down-payment into 3 easy
installments, or finance the entire treatment with our trusted resource, Care Credit.
* Guaranteed Convenience : with the Platinum Plus membership level, your family will enjoy guaranteed
after-school and after-work appointments or before-school / before-work appointments. We're the only
office in Kansas City offering this type of guaranteed convenience and the parents who sign up the entire
family typically save around 15% off the cost of treatment when paid in advance.
I'M NOT CRAZY TO MAKE AN OFFER LIKE THIS... but I would be if I didn't limit how many people can
take advantage of it. I'm setting the number firmly at 15. If you are not in the group, you can certainly still
take advantage of orthodontic treatment with our office, but the opportunity to split your down-payment
into 3 installments will end promptly today at 4:59PM (CST).
There are 12 remaining spots.
This offer expires TODAY at 4:59 PM (CST).

1) Call (816) 929-6922 and ask for Kevin.
