3) Fax your name and telephone number toll-free to 866-253-1590
Remember, we're celebrating Labor Day because the American worker has acheived so much over the
years. Make this the day that you achieve something spectacular for you or your child. Now is the time.
To your spectacular smile,
Dr. Burleson

Pay 3 Way option is gone like the team of coal miners that worked with my grandfather when the whistle
blew at the end of their shift.

-- 213 of 625 --

Meet Dr. Rick Schaefer
I
’m Dr. Rick Schaefer M.D.
did you know that over 100
million Americans suffer
from knee and joint pain? In
fact, this pain accounts for 25%
of all visits to primary care
physicians and half of all anti-
inflammatory drug prescrip-
tions. I’m pleased to announce
that knee pain sufferers don’t
have to wait any longer to get
the most advanced non-surgical
FDA cleared treatment.
If you suffer from any degree of
knee pain, I invite you to regain
control of your life by visiting
Knee Specialists of Wisconsin, a
state of the art medical facility.
What is osteoarthritis?
/STEOARTHRITIS␀/! ␀ALSO␀KNOWN␀
as degenerative joint disease, is
the most common type of arthri-
tis. In OA, the surface layer of
cartilage breaks down and wears
away resulting in pain, swelling,
and loss of motion of the joint.
In most individuals joint damage
develops gradually over years.
The cause of osteoarthritis is un-
known. Factors that might cause
it include the following:
␀␀s␀"EING␀OVERWEIGHT
␀␀s␀'ETTING␀OLDER␀WEAR␀AND␀TEAR
␀␀s␀*OINT␀INJURY
␀␀s␀␀*OINTS␀THAT␀ARE␀NOT␀PROPERLY␀
FORMED␀ALIGNMENTIMBALANCE␀
PROBLEMS
␀␀s␀␀!␀GENETIC␀DEFECT␀IN␀THE␀JOINT␀
cartilage
␀␀s␀␀3TRESSES␀ON␀THE␀JOINTS␀FROM␀CER-
tain activities including sports,
work and leisure activities
What is available to
treat knee pain?
After careful study and several
trials the FDA cleared a new
treatment aimed at helping those
with knee pain. This treatment is
a high tech answer for all those
who think that surgery, dietary
supplements and prescription
medications are the only option
to eliminate knee pain.
How does this treat-
ment work?
Advanced live motion x-ray
technology with dye allows
Doctors to pinpoint problem
areas with extreme accuracy. A
viscosupplement is then injected
and the healing process begins.
Viscosupplementation bonds
with naturally occurring joint
fluid to create a lubricating and
cushioning layer. It also reduces
pain, inflammation, and swell-
ing of the joint. Most patients
compare the treatment to getting
a shot at the doctors office and
report little pain or discomfort.
What is actually
injected into the knee?
(YALURONIC␀!CID␀(YALGAN ␀IS␀
similar to substances that occur
naturally in your joint. The out-
SIDE␀OF␀THE␀JOINT␀JOINT␀CAPSULE ␀
is comprised of a sturdy fibrous
tissue. The lining of the joint
capsule contains synovial cells
which secrete a thick, viscous
synovial fluid. Hyaluronic acid
contributes to the viscous nature
of the joint fluid, nourishes the
cartilage, helps eliminate waste
products, lubricates the joint and
acts as a shock absorber inside
the joint. Hyaluronic acid is
reduced or lost with those who
suffer from osteoarthritis.
Therefore, the easiest way to think
of hyaluronic acid injections is
that they help replace the joint’s
natural fluid, which is otherwise
lost in osteoarthritis. It is sort of
like changing the oil in your car.
If your car were to run low on
oil you would have some serious
wear and tear on the moving parts.
More oil would be necessary to
remedy the situation.
When will I feel results?
Most people feel better in a
matter of weeks and can begin
enjoying everyday activities.
Will my insurance cover
this treatment?
Medicare and most major
insurances will pay for some
if not all of our services.
How do I know that this
is right for me?
In most cases, if you have knee
pain, this is a great solution.
Our doctors will give you an
honest and fair evaluation of
your particular knee pain. To
accommodate demand, we have
opened our schedule for the
first 30 callers to receive a
KNEE PAIN EVALUATION.
NOW IS THE TIME TO
TAKE CONTROL OF YOUR
LIFE AND SAY GOODBYE
TO KNEE PAIN THE
NON-SURGICAL WAY!

pain with the injections.

— Inarae D.

A D V E R T I S E M E N T
Copyright © Epic Marketing 2011
Is there a lasting treat-
ment for the symptoms
of Neuropathy?
Treating a problem by masking the
symptom has never been a viable long
term solution. Previous treatment
options for Peripheral Neuropathy
have been a small handful of pain
medications. This type of pain relief
is temporary. Often these treatments
lead to even more health problems or
worse yet—addiction. So many people
innocently fall into abusing pain pills
while initially using them to alleviate
the pain. It’s time to look into a solu-
tion to your pain that does not involve
prescription pain pills.
If you suffer from one or
more of these symptoms,
you might have Diabetic
Peripheral Neuropathy
Many patients have been frustrated by
traditional care, only to find that their
symptoms keep getting worse. Dia-
betic Peripheral Neuropathy is a nerve
disorder caused by Diabetes. Over
time, uncontrolled sugar levels can
damage your nerves. This nerve dam-
age causes different symptoms and the
problems first appear in the toes, feet,
and hands. Some other contributing
factors to Neuropathy may include:
hereditary disorders, inflammation,
chemotherapy and certain other
medications.
Call today!
262-649-8408 620 S. 76th Suite 240, Milwaukee, WI 53214
www.kneeWI.com
CALL TODAY
TO SCHEDULE YOUR
APPOINTMENT!
Finally, a Lasting solution for
Peripheral Neuropathy
Neuropathy may
contribute to emotional
stress and depression
Many people suffering with pain don’t
realize that the symptoms could be
due to Peripheral Neuropathy. It is a
condition that can be misdiagnosed or
ignored until it is unbearable. This can
affect all aspects of your life and may
even cause emotional stress or depres-
sion. Why suffer longer than you need
to? If you feel that your symptoms may
be caused by Peripheral Neuropathy,
call today and schedule an appoint-
ment with Dr. Schaefer. If you are
experiencing severe pain, take action
now! Don’t let pain control your life!
The solution: Lasting
Neuropathy treatment
Our new program for treating Periph-
eral Neuropathy is a minimally inva-
sive series of injections combined with
therapy, which has helped hundreds
across the country.
Our combination of therapeutic
procedures utilizes breakthrough tech-
nology that aids in healing the dam-
aged nerves. This treatment restores,
stabilizes, and rebuilds the nerves in
your extremities. The vast majority of
patients who have gone through our
program have reported a significant
drop in the level of pain after just the
2nd or 3rd treatment. Each patient will
receive customized treatments for
their condition in order
to achieve the
best possible
results.
WHAT ARE PATIENTS SAYING?
“This has been a fantastic year at Knee Specialists of Wisconsin. We have helped hundreds of
pain sufferers find lasting relief from their persistent pain. We are pleased to expand our offer-
ing and bring hope and pain-free lives to many others. If you suffer from pain due to Peripheral
Neuropathy—tingling, numbness, burning, or you can’t even feel your feet—I invite you to call
our office and schedule an appointment to learn more about the latest treatment available. More
than 20 million Americans suffer from Peripheral Neuropathy, a condition caused by damage
to the nerves. Whether it’s work, play or time spent with the family, Neuropathy pain ultimately
lowers your quality of life by affecting everything that you do. I am here to tell you that there is
hope. You can get rid of your pain and get your life back. At Knee Specialist of Wisconsin, we of-
fer the most advanced programs available and our goal is to help you have a better quality of life.
Call and schedule your appointment to speak with me personally. We will explain the options for
treatment and determine whether you qualify for our program. There is no obligation, and the
only thing you have to lose is your pain.”
— Dr. Rick Schaefer, M.D.
There are many symptoms of Peripheral Neuropathy, which is essentially damage to the pe-
ripheral nerve system. Some Peripheral Neuropathy sufferers describe it as wearing an invisible
‘sock’ of pins and needles, burning pain or extreme electric-like sensitivity to touch. Others
report the sensation of walking on broken glass or thumbtacks.

Pain in Your
Legs and Feet

Section 3
Business to
Business
People mistakenly believe and stubbornly insist that
“business to business” is dramatically different from
“consumer” marketing – and they are dead wrong. 	The
truth is that the differences are minimal. 	Often,
strategies that work in consumer marketing work even
better when applied in the corporate environment.
There are 2 main reasons for this; it is more important
to “stand out” in business-to-business, and “business-
to-business marketing” is a misnomer…businesses don’t
actually buy anything...people in businesses buy.
289
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 289 of 625 --

Business-to-Business & Industrial Marketing 	COPYRIGHT FREE
3-Step Free Consult/Exam Letter Campaign (Computer Services) - Step #1
Photo
Dear CEO,
You Already Have Computers, But Are
They Sleeping 	On
The Job?
I know you already have computers in the offices - but I wonder if yours are "laying down on the job," too?
Many of my clients got computers to make their businesses and employees more efficient.... To make
information more accessible... to solve specific problems; they invested money in sophisticated computers and
software... but, after all the dust settle d ...
THEIR PEOPLE ARE ONLY USING THE DAMNED THINGS
AS GIANT TYPERWITERS OR CALCULATORS!
The "dream" has turned into one big, fat disappointment. 	(Maybe even a nightmare. )
MY FREE 45-MINUTE PRODUCTIVITY BREAKTHROUGHS ANALYSIS
MAY (FINALLY) MAKE THOSE COMPUTERS REALLY PAY OFF.
In less than one hour, I can ask you and your people a few key questions, examine your computers and
software, and provide a very, very revealing analysis of all the unused or under-used capabilities "sleeping" in
your computer s ... advise you on how to "wake 'em up"... and show you how to really improve your business
with the computer capabilities you already own.
"AMAZING DISCOVERIES"
Business owner after business owner tells me - "I had no idea I could do THAT with those darned computers."
(In fact, a page of my clients' comments is enclosed.) I promise: amazing discoveries await you, too- with
my free analysis.
Then, if it's appropriate, and entirely at your option, I can offer:
"Shortcut" employee training, one-on-one or in group sessions, scheduled at YOUR convenience
Generous trade-in allowances on equipment OR software
E-Z Lease Terms for new phone/FAX modems, high speed printers, other 'power tools'
Custom software development
Cleaning, maintenance, service
But just from my FREE ANALYSIS alone, you'll undoubtedly get more value from your computers than ever
before.
To schedule your free analysis, call, or FAX in your business card and I'll call you.
Sincerely,
Willie Wizard
Wizard Computer Consultants, Inc.

Computers Were Sleeping On The Job.

Dear CEO,
Two weeks back, I sent you a letter offering you a FREE 45-MINUTE ANALYSIS, to reveal to you how
to maximize the performance of the computers, software and employees you already have ... how to get
more out of 'em! Surely ANY reasonable opportunity to improve productivity (without increasing costs )
has to be important to you, too.

unused or under-used capabilities sitting right there in your office. And, here is my incredible Guarantee:
THAT'S RIGHT: I'M GOING TO GUARANTEE MY FREE ANALYSIS
-I'LL PAY YOU $100.00 IF...
Give me just 45 minutes of yours and your staff's time. If I can't show you opportunities to make better,
more valuable use of your computers that you get excited about; if you can honestly say that I wasted your
time, then I'll give you a business letter-writing software package worth over $100.00 for your time!
That's how certain I am that my Analysis will astound and amaze you!
Call me.
Willie Wizard
PS: About half the business owners who take advantage of this free Analysis wind up using my services,
for employee training, software modification, or to take their software in trade for more effective software.
Obviously, I hope there'll be a reason for us to do business together too. But there's no obligation. Your
Analysis really is FREE.

3-Step Free Consult/Exam Letter Campaign (Computer Services) – Step #3
Photo
Boy, are you STUBBORN.
That trait probably serves you well in many business
situations. But stubbornly ignoring MY letters is
COSTING you money. I'll prove it. I guarantee it.
Dear CEO,
Go take a walk through your offices and look at the computers, and software, and printers sitting there on
desks. Are your employees thrilled with them? Are they doing everything you'd hoped they would do? Are
they really productive? 	Are you happy with the return-on-investment you're getting?
OK, if all that's true - y ou are right- you DON'T need me- throw this letter out too, and I'll stop bugging
you.
BUT IF YOU KNOW DARNED WELL THAT YOUR COMPUTERS AREN'T DOING HALF THE
THINGS THEY COULD DO AND SHOULD DO ...
If you know they're spending most of their time as over-priced typewriters. If your people get frustrated with
them daily. If you still have “challenges”' computers were supposed to solve but didn't. 	If you have entire
software packages sitting on a shelf gathering dust.
You are NOT alone!
The question is: will you let those computers get away with it? Or will you do something about it?
FOR FREE, I'LL COME IN AND "DE-MYSTIFY" EVERYTHING ABOUT YOUR COMPUTERS - I'LL
REVEAL HOW YOU CAN GET THOSE BUGGERS TO REALLY EARN THEIR KEEP!
My FREE 45-MINUTE ANALYSIS is absolutely unique. I should charge a thousand bucks for it. but instead
of charging you for it, I'll not only give it to you free, heck, I'll guarantee it: if I don't show you amazing
opportunities to get better results and productivity from the computers you already own, I'll give you a
$100.00+ value business correspondence software program free, too.
This free offer is going to be withdrawn, however, if I do not hear from you by the date stamped below, in red
ink. Obviously, I'm limited in the number of these analyses I can provide, so we only allow a set number of
these invitations to remain open at a time. I have to take yours away, to offer it to someone else.
Please call me TODAY.
Willie Wizard
PS: Even if you're not ready for the Analysis, you'll at least want a copy of my 18-page, detailed Report: THE
19 'SECRETS' BUSINESS OWNERS NEED TO KNOW, TO SUCCESSFULLY BOSS THEIR
COMPUTERS AROUND. 	I'll be happy to send you a copy, free of charge, just for asking. Call or FAX a
note to me at 000-0000. This Report deals with issues of full utilization and productivity in plain English- not
computer babble. It's a "lock" to save AND make you money.

March 17
John Q. Toughguy
Factory Supervisor
XYZ Manufacturing Co.
123 Gadget Street
Wappakeneta, Pennsylvania
Dear Mr. Toughguy,
All factory clean-up
chemicals are the same,
aren't 	they?
READ MY LETTER A N D I'LL MAKE YOU A BIG HERO WITH EVERYBODY WHO WORKS
FOR YOU AND WITH THE 'FAT CATS' UPSTAIRS, TOO!
Well, all industrial chemicals are a lot alike. But not perfectly alike. The enclosed 8-page Report
PROVES that Whizbang DeGreaser works faster, leaves less residue, is safer, and costs less in usage. All
that's in the report.
But I don’t want you to buy any Whizbang DeGreaser.
No, this letter is not out to sell you anything.
I do not want even a nickel of your company’s money .
All I want is a 23-minute opportunity to come onto your factory floor, with you and your team, take
whatever gunked up, greasy, dirt and grime covered part or tools you want to give me, and do a
"Challenge Demonstration" with whatever de-greaser you use now and Whizbang.
In 23 minutes, I'll have you shaking your head in amazement at the difference.
And, as thanks for your time, I'll buy lunch for you AND your entire team * ...
WHO SAYS THERE’S NO SUCH THING AS A FREE LUNCH?
I'll bring in a giant multi-foot long sub sandwich, chips and Cokes for everybody as "thanks" for getting
to demonstrate Whizbang in your factory.

DeGreasers. I haven't heard from you, and I'll bet that means you (a) don't believe that this product can be
superior to whatever you use now or (b) that it'll cost too much, so having me come and demonstrate it
would be a waste of time.
That's why I've sent you the enclosed Video Tape. As you can see, it's labeled "The
Tough Customer's And Skeptic's Tape."
Turn this video on and watch as Whizbang tackles de-greasing jobs you wouldn't wish on your worst
enemy. See for yourself how different this formulation is. In fact, I dare you to watch this video and still
NOT want to try Whizbang for yourself in your own factory.
John Industry

Big Billy Shakespeare, Shakespeare Asphalt, Poetry Co., Inc.

WHY TARP AT ALL?
Many of our clients are first forced to tarp, by the laws that are passing all over the country, at all levels,
almost daily. There are tarping laws in over XX states, including California and Florida, and many
cities and counties; if you aren't dealing with tarping laws now, you WILL be. (You can check with your
highway patrol and local police concerning their current enforcement practices. There are tickets, fines,
hassles.)

reasons, most clients discover that XYZ Tarps deliver lots of other important benefits. 	They wind up

lot of people just can't fully appreciate it UNTIL THEY SEE IT IN ACTION. (Every time I

happened to inquire right in the middle of our Spring-'94 New Client Campaign, so you
received a $500-BILL, good for discounts of $50 to $500. But those discounts are about to
expire. I wonder: why haven't we heard from you?
Have We Screwed Up?
o 	Is there some information we haven't provided, that you need?
o 	Have we somehow been confusing?
o 	Are you considering a different type of tarping system?
o 	Is there a question?... about price?... application?
Even if you're not ready to get a Tarp. I'd really appreciate it if you'd call in, talk with us
briefly, and let us know where we stand, where you stand.
Sincerely,
Carl Canvas
P.S. I know you're busy and have a pile of stuff crossing your desk every day. And I do
appreciate your giving me some of your time, considering my information. 	I also know how
easy it is for things you intend to do something with, to still get lost in the shuffle. I've
attached a copy of my first letter, for your easy reference. It includes the 17 REASONS
WHY XYZ TARPS ARE THE BEST. I hope you'll review it or keep it for future reference.
P.P.S. We can extend the deadline on your $500 SAVINGS CERTIFICATE for a little
while, if that would help you. Call and we'll discuss it.

Even if your competitors can see what you are doing from the outside, they will never be able to
We wanted our campaigns to blow our competitors marketing away. They might send a single
direct mail piece or maybe an email here and there or even possibly a salesman would make
an appointment. But we did an entire campaign of multiple emails, phone calls, multiple direct
mail pieces and then the grand finale of our secret weapon which resulted in 100% response!
Our campaign was a 12 step campaign with 4 types of media that resulted in $414,911.40 in sales
and a media efficiency ratio of 69:1
Step 1 – Phone call #1 – scripted to verify contact information and qualification questions
Step 2 – Direct Mail Piece #1 – 3D mail piece with trash can
Step 3 – Email #1
Step 4 – Direct Mail Piece #2 – 3D mail piece with aspirin
Step 5 – Email #2
Step 6 – Email #3
Step 7 – Direct Mail Piece #3 – 3D mail piece with silver platter
Step 8 – Email #4
Step 9 – Email #5
Step 10 – Phone call #2 – scripted to set up salesman visit or secret weapon deployment
Step 11 – Salesman visit
Step 12 – Deploy secret weapon
duplicate what is going on behind the scenes. Let them try all they want and fail! It may look
simple but the details are what keep this part of your marketing system successful.
Revel in the complexity, because your competitors won’t touch it!

-- 312 of 625 --

Attention: If you read this letter and realize that you DON’T meet the high standards that we’ve set
for our exclusive program, then I urge you to throw this letter in the trash right away and continue
on doing your business exactly as you are right now.
Finally! 	There’s a way to
keep clients from
constantly badgering you to lower your prices…
AND set yourself apart from the competition
so that your paycheck is increasing…
no matter what the economy is doing!
You CAN free yourself from needy clients and provide them with reliable, working
equipment that won’t break down on them… and if it does, the repair is FREE!
PLUS you’ll increase your sales (which will in turn increase your own paycheck) and
you’ll be able to offer a service that simply can’t be undercut, can’t be stolen by
distributors, and that will keep your clients coming back for more and more.
How would you like to increase your sales
by $198,225.20 this year?
Take just a few minutes to find out how you can qualify to be one of the few people that will have access to
this service for your clients!
Dear Heath,
I’m sure you’re wondering why I’ve sent you a mini trash can with this letter stuffed inside. Well, I did it for 3
reasons:
1. I wanted a sure-fire way to get your attention, and who isn’t curious when a trash can shows up in their
mailbox?
2. I wanted to warn you that if you throw this letter away, you’re tossing out an incredible opportunity to
change the way you do business.
3. I’m really serious about this opportunity being exclusive – in fact, there’s an application to fill out
so we can ensure that we’ve got really quality people on our team. If you don’t meet the criteria I’ll tell
you about in this letter, I really do want you to throw it away because it won’t be the right fit.
If you’re still with me, I’d like for you to take a minute
and imagine your typical day at work.
If you’re like most of our clients, you’re inundated with phone calls and e-mails from clients, asking you to look
up pricing, discuss specifications, find out repair times, give them a discount, help them plan new equipment,
and a million other requests each and every day… and everything is a full-blown emergency.
I was speaking with one of my best clients, Joe from Sherman, Texas. He’s an outside account manager for
the second largest industrial distributer in the country, and he was telling me about how all his clients are
beating him up on prices and his overall sales were down. He got tired of his clients wanting him to be the
cheapest… because every time he lowered his prices, his own paycheck went down!
The best he could hope for was a client who didn’t fight him too much on prices, a new client coming in from a
referral, or a “good” day where he was able to come close to his quota.
313
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 313 of 625 --

But I have to tell you that hopes and dreams are no way to ensure that you’re successful. You have to
actively seek out new clients… and even then, you have to set yourself apart from the rest of the clients and
account managers that are fighting for the business of your clients each and every single day.
I realize that I just described how insanely busy you are every single
day, and then I told you to find time to seek out new clients and set
yourself apart from the competition... You’re probably looking at this
letter thinking that I’m crazy, that I can’t possibly understand what
your typical day is like, and how the heck are you supposed to find new
clients when you can barely breathe?
What if I told you that I could help you increase your average ticket
amount, make your clients happier, AND cut down on those emergency
“I need this fixed NOW!” phone calls?
Would you be okay if I made your job a little easier and helped you make more money at the same time?
(I’ll give you a hint: You should probably answer “yes” to that question.)
My name is Walter Bergeron, and I’m the president of Power Control Services. We’ve developed an exciting
program that can help you increase your volume while keeping your clients happy… AND set you apart from
your competitors so you become the “go-to” person for all their equipment needs.
It’s called our Platinum Rebuild Program, and it’s completely changing the way you do business
with your clients.
Basically, instead of repairing the equipment, we’re going to completely rebuild it from the ground up. We’re
going to use Military Grade Electrical Components instead of using the materials with the least up-front cost.
That means it’s going to run longer and better than a simple repaired piece of machinery.
But we’re not just going to replace the faulty piece and ship it back out – we do a Proactive Rebuild. That
means we’re going to make sure it stays working – every single time – or we’ll fix it until it does. The
equipment will get a full ultrasonic cleaning (instead of the topical cleaning typically performed) to make sure
all the rust and corrosion is removed and we’ll use our Circuit Board Encapsulation Method to make sure that
moisture never gets into the electrical components.
Plainly put: Your client is going to get back better equipment than they sent to us in the
first place.
They’re also going to save money on their
equipment, even though the initial cost is
higher. Typically, equipment fails after only 1
year of regular use, and then they’re going to
spend time and money to get it repaired again
and again. With Platinum Rebuild, they’re going
to fix it once and never have to worry about
paying to fix it again.
But those aren’t the only benefits you’ll get from the Platinum Rebuild Program. We’ve taken our program and
supercharged it so that it’s the only choice you could ever want to offer your clients.
First, and it’s a big one: The Warranty Never Runs Out.
OEM warranties are being extended. Other distributors are extending their warranties. You can’t compete
because every time you do, someone bests you and then you’re back to offering the same plain-vanilla
warranty that everyone else has, and then you’re back to trying to lower your prices.
Not anymore. You can now offer a 100% lifetime warranty. Unless your client blows the equipment up with
illegal explosives or puts it up against a forklift in a cage-style match… in other words, if they use it like
they’re supposed to… it’s 100% covered. Whether it sits on a shelf for 25 years or runs for 24 hours a day,
it’s completely covered.
“We consistently pick up
multiple repairs with every client
we visit and now we’ve got a lot
of momentum to keep going.”
Dan Ortbal
Chemtronics
Marietta, GA
314
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 314 of 625 --

The repair will be performed by IPC 7711/7721 Rework and Repair Instructors and Operators, US Military
Veterans and a Team of Factory Trained Engineering Technicians. There’s nobody better to make your clients’
equipment the best it can be… or to fix it for free if it fails.
Next, we’re going to train you on how to sell it. We’ll
send one of our National Account Managers to your location to
teach you and your staff on every single detail of the program.
He’s going to go with you to visit some clients and even sell the
program for you a few times so you can see exactly how it’s done.
He’s going to go over some of the fastest ways to generate
immediate sales for the rebuild program to leave you with a fully
profitable rebuild program in place. All you have to do is pick a date and he’s on his way.

and your staff, cheat-sheets to use while you’re on the phone, marketing materials you can send out to your
clients (if you want to – see below to find out how we take care of that for you too.) We’ll send you the
pricing catalog so you’ll know exactly the scope of what you can offer (it’s 850 pages… is that enough to
offer?) and we can even create a custom website just for your clients so your branding is on everything you
do.
Then we’re going to set you up with an automated Client Followup System – a fully behind-the-
scenes marketing system that will keep you at the front of your clients’ minds that you don’t have to think
about or worry about or lift a finger to complete.
We’ll send out a monthly newsletter, branded with your company and your contact information, that will be
fun to read but also reminding them that you’re their solution for their equipment rebuild needs. We’ll send
out reinforcement presentations to keep them sold on the idea of rebuilding their equipment, and we’ll make
sure they know to call you to get it handled.
But don’t worry – we’re not going to flood their mailboxes with too much junk. Just enough to keep them
interested and coming back for more.
But we’re not done yet. We’re also going to give you a 25% discount to increase your own personal
paycheck. You’re already going to be making more profit on the rebuilds versus repairs, but the discount will
help you make even more money.
We’re giving you Area Exclusivity. You will be the only one in your area able to offer our program, and
your clients will only be able to access our services through you. We will never become your competitor.
We’re going to back you up with sales support. If you have a question that you simply can’t
answer, you just give us a call and we’ll help you get your client’s needs met. If you want us to help you
design a custom presentation to take to your client… well, we can do that too.
We’re also going to back your client up with
around the clock technical support. If they have
a question, problem, concern, anything – they can just
give us a call and we’ll walk them through how
everything works. That keeps your phone from ringing
with problems all day long, because they’ve already been
answered directly by us.
We’ll ship the equipment completely FREE.
Once you send us the RMA, we’ll send you (or your client) the shipping label and tags they can place on the
machine to indicate what’s not working, and we handle the cost. Even if it’s big, heavy and costs a lot to
ship… you don’t have to worry about one cent.
Finally… we’re going to upgrade you and your clients to Priority Service, completely free.
Your repairs and rebuilds will go straight to the front of the line and be finished before everyone else. Not
only do we offer the fastest service (days, not weeks), but you’re going to be able to say that it’s being done

Plainly put… we’re going to make you so irresistible to your clients that they wouldn’t dream of

perform our normal repair service on them.
2. We need to be your sole resource for repairs and rebuilds. We’re committing resources, promising
you that nobody else in your area can offer this service and that we’re never going to go directly to your
clients behind your back… the least you can do is be loyal to us and give us every opportunity for repair as
you can, even if it’s not a Platinum Rebuild.

cost of over $500. This means you need to ship us 2 pieces of equipment to be rebuilt per month to
maintain area exclusivity.
4. You need to fill out an application at www.powercontrolservices.com/platinum and agree to go
through our process to ensure that your company is the right fit for the Platinum Rebuild Program.
Once you’ve filled out the application, the process is quite simple.
You’ll present the system to your clients and let us take care of the followup. Once you get an order, you’ll
contact us for the RMA and we’ll do the rebuild. The lifetime client relationships are as easy as pie after that!!
NOW is the time to take charge of your sales and make the kind of money you need to make. Don’t let the
economy be your excuse for why your sales are down and your checks are lower. The Platinum Rebuild

you want.

rest of your career!

help you reduce your needy client headaches, beat the competition and increase your paycheck.

be accepted, and I don’t want you to miss out on your opportunity because you’ve hesitated,
forgotten, or otherwise just taken your time.

make sure all your clients are happy so they don’t jump ship to a competitor, and you end each and
every day feeling like you’ve been through the wringer because everyone wants you to lower your
prices or sweeten the deal or extend your warranty or any of the million other requests that you get.

days like that for the rest of your career.

now know that they have the upper hand. You NEED them. That means that they feel free to
walk all over you to get the best deal that they can so that they look good in front of their boss

to get them.

likes to get gifts and this things is so intriguing it is opened up 100% of the time immediately

enjoying the king cake while they watch a short video about our services. This thing gets
results, and since we know that these clients are worth $34,575 each we can afford to spend
the $200 for each of these cases, but we also include a prepaid shipping label and we actually
get these returned to us and they ask for a refill on the King Cake. We have to outsmart our
competitors if we expect to out perform their marketing and that’s exactly what we did. We

I’m Worried about you…
Dear Shelter Customer,
Yes, I really am worried about you. Dawn (our office manager) was
checking on our past customers and she realized that it’s been too long
since we’ve heard from you at Shelter Distribution.
So, we’re giving you the FREE $20.00 Shelter Gift Certificate in this
letter (It even Doubles to $40.00 with your purchase of $200 or more, and
Quadruples to $80 with your purchase of $500 or more)!
Here are 3 Reasons Why Our Competition Hates Us
But You’re Going to Love Us!
1. Get Everything You Need From One Roofing Supplier. Just
One Phone Call: You’ll save time and money when you make one
call to get all of your shingles, felt, nails, caulk, drip edge, vents,
ice & water shield, and yes, even your Roofer Rewards customer
loyalty program.
2. You Get World Class Service. Get next day delivery service or
pick up from our warehouse. We’re so serious about giving you
World Class service that we stake our reputation on it. It actually is
very simple. Everyone here knows Only Happy Clients Come
Back...and our job is to be sure you are happy - every time!
3. You Get Your Order On Time - Every Time: Guaranteed
Delivery Service: Within minutes of placing your order it will be
pulled and ready for shipment. If you place your order on stock
product before 2 PM, it will ship the next day, and if you place it
later and tell us you need it right away, we’ll do our best to get it out that day.
HURRY! Offer Expires April 8th!
What Is A Worry Doll?
Worry dolls are traditionally made
in Guatemala. A person (usually
a child) who cannot sleep due to
worrying can express their
worries to the doll and place it
under their pillow before going to
sleep.
According to folklore, the doll is
thought to worry in the person's
place, thereby permitting the
person to sleep peacefully. The
person will wake up without their
worries, because which have been
taken away by the dolls during the
night.
Parents may remove the doll
during the night, reinforcing the
child's belief that the worry is
gone. Some parents involve the
child in making the dolls to
further increase the psychological
benefits of releasing worries.
$20.00 Shelter Gift Certificate in this letter. It even
Doubles to $40.00 with your purchase of $200 or
more, and Quadruples to $80 with your purchase of
$500 or more!

Dear Mark,
First, I want to wish you a Happy New Year, and I hope you had some time to enjoy with
family and friends during this holiday season! Also, I hope you exceed all of your goals in
2013!
Does the thought of having to create your own marketing plan for your business have you
feeling sick to your stomach? If you’re like most business owners, it probably does. As
marketing has transformed considerably, especially in the last eighteen months, most
business owners do not even know what is available for effective marketing strategies.
Let’s face it, years ago all you had to do was have a yellow page ad. If you really wanted to get
the phone to ring, you would make sure your ad was the biggest in your category. Today,
there are so many more options from Twitter to Direct Mail to a Website to Cold Calling to
Video … and the list goes on and on.
“Mark, I hope you have your
marketing plan for 2013. If not, I
included two packs of antacids to
help your upset stomach!”
In 2012, I traveled to 11 cities throughout
the US seeking out the most innovative
marketing strategies. 	I normally would
have given you just one pack of antacids,
but I know if you don’t have a plan of
action in place for 2013 … you WILL need
the second pack!
Jimmy, pictured above with
liquid antacid & tablet antacids,
thinking about the business
owners who haven’t yet planned
their marketing for 2013.
As a small business owner myself, I know we don’t have unlimited marketing
budgets like Microsoft and other large corporations. We have to choose what
medias, messages, and audiences to target to bring our businesses the best returns on
our investment. Since 2005, when I spent over $100,000 in advertising in the yellow
pages, on the radio, in the newspaper, sending postcards, on Google and so much
more, I have been seeking out the best strategies. Through years of testing and
research, I have found the best results with integrating traditional media with our
website and serving our prospects and clients first, before making the sale. In fact,
we have seen returns of 742%, 1,235% and 990% on our last 3 direct marketing
campaigns, respectively. Response rates averaged 3.5%.
“You 	were 	born 	to 	win, 	but 	to 	be 	a
winner, 	you 	must 	plan 	to 	win,
prepare 	to 	win, 	and 	expect 	to 	win.”
-­‐ 	Zig 	Ziglar
“Talent 	wins 	games, 	but 	teamwork
and 	intelligence 	wins 	championships.”
-­‐ 	Michael 	Jordan

possible. As you have built a successful business, your offline reputation is extremely good! In fact, you
most likely get many word-­‐of-­‐mouth referrals because of your great reputation!
But, how is your online reputation? Do you have any reviews online? If you do, are the reviews good?
You can check this easily by going to www.Google.com, www.Yahoo.com, www.CitySearch.com,
www.Yelp.com, and many other review websites and simply put in your town, state and company name.
We can help you with this research, as well.

-- 354 of 625 --

78% of people trust peer recommendations (reviews), while only 8% trust ads. For example, when you hear
of a good restaurant from a friend, you’re likely to go to it versus if you just saw an ad in the newspaper for
the same restaurant.
Problem: Most businesses today do not ask their clients for feedback.
Why is feedback important? By getting feedback from your clients, you improve customer service, strengthen your
relationship with your clients, and improve your staff and your team.
Why are reviews online so important? The search engines such as Google, Yahoo! Local, Bing, etc. are using reviews
within their own sites, as well as other review websites on the Internet to help rank websites. From a search engine’s
standpoint, there is no better way to rank websites than by listening to the actual customer’s feedback of the respective
business. Remember, the search engine cannot call up or go to each business and then rank websites. The search
engines can only use data to rank websites. Reviews are a big component of increasing your visibility online.
Additionally, by having good, quality reviews posted by your clients you will have social proof and credibility that is
superior to just listing reviews on your website. Finally, these reviews can help turn your prospects into clients.
Why can’t my friends just post reviews on Google+ Local, Yelp, Yahoo! Local, etc.? Google tracks IP addresses (the
location of the reviewer) and looks at review history of the reviewer. If the same IP address is being used or the person
hasn’t posted Google+ Local reviews previously, chances are the reviews will not be displayed to the public. Also,
people can typically tell when reviews are fake, thus giving you less credibility.
How did Dr. John “Jack” Johnson of Contemporary
Dentistry go from 2 reviews on Google to 44
reviews in 48 hours? In November of last year, we
sent an email blast to all of his patients with the
subject: “We Want Your Feedback: Opportunity to
Win an Ipad2.” Dr. Jack got in over 200 reviews
internally. Of those, 42 of his patients posted their
review on Google. For the reviewer taking the time
to post the review on Google, the reviewer was
entered to win the iPad2, three more times. Also,
remember the only reviewers asked to share their
review on Google+ Local or other review websites
are the reviewers who submitted a 5. This helps filter out any negative reviews from going public. Any review that is
less than 5 is submitted internally. Currently, Contemporary Dentistry maintains the top spot for Groton, CT Dentist
and has a 29/30 rating on Google +Local. Since they started with this program in November of last year, we have
helped Contemporary Dentistry gain the top spot for Groton, CT Dentist on Yahoo! Local with 71, 5-­‐Star reviews.
Additionally, InputWanted.com has helped them gain the top spot on CitySearch. Being on top of CitySearch is
important because CitySearch.com feeds their reviews into Bing, which has caused Contemporary Dentistry to be on
top of Bing, as well. 	Finally, we have helped them earn an A rating on Angies List. With such a strong online
reputation, Contemporary Dentistry is far ahead of its competition that virtually has no reviews online. Routinely,
Contemporary Dentistry is getting new patients from online searches as well as people reading the reviews. This
positive, dominating, online reputation positions Contemporary Dentistry as the leader and trusted provider in
Groton, CT and surrounding towns for dentistry services.
For Reagan Homes Only 	Page 1
355
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 355 of 625 --

How Did Angies Pizza & Pier 27 Lounge go to a 26/30 rating on Google+ Local without an email list?
We printed promotional signage that
was put in the restaurant. Many
submitted reviews, right from their
phones. Within a couple of months,
Angies had enough reviews to gain the
top-­‐rating category “extraordinary to
perfection” with Google+ Local.
How did Galaxy Roller Rink earn a
28/30 rating on Google+ Local? We
sent out an email blast, provided
signage, and they announced the
opportunity to win an iPad3 during
skating sessions if people submitted
reviews to GalaxyReviews.com.
Who else is using InputWanted.com? We have over 100 affiliates worldwide implementing this system within their
own respective local markets. We have many more case studies and examples to share. For this system to work, the
business itself has to provide top quality products and/or services with exceptional customer service. Additionally,
having more than 50 transactions per month will help increase the number of reviews that get posted online.
Regardless, asking your clients for feedback and giving them a chance to win an iPad or equivalent prize is a must
whether you have one transaction a year or 10,000 transactions per year as it will strengthen your relationship.
Also, our research has proven that people use Google and other major search engines to seek out businesses, even after
a word of mouth referral. It is very common for people to Google the business name or person’s name before they call
or visit the business. When you Google a service or business, typically your eyes go right to the review area next to the
Google map. Moreover, our research has shown that most industries, other than hotels and restaurants, do not have
any ratings or reviews. When you have 10 reviews on Google+ Local, Google will display your ranking on the main
search results. Imagine the impact of being one of the only businesses to be ranked by Google.
Being visible on Google is so important as there are over 168
million unique people using Google each month, compared to
only 29 million using YellowPages.com, and 6 million for
Yellowbook.com (includes US traffic only, from Compete.com).
The timing is perfect for implementing our review system,
InputWanted.com because most businesses do not yet have a
review system in place, YET. Do a Google map search for a
search phrase related to your business and you will see that most
businesses have 0 reviews right now. At last, you have a chance
to get ahead of your competition, as most businesses do not have a system in place for soliciting reviews; nevermind a
system to filter out the bad reviews from going public automatically, like InputWanted. You can stand out from the
competition and we can help take care of this whole process for you or you can with our proprietary system,
InputWanted.com that costs less than the cost of the prizes given away.

www.getwsodownload.com

-- 357 of 625 --

JimmyMarketing is our marketing division, while EasyWebCreations.com is our custom
web design division, which is now a part of JimmyMarketing.
www.JimmyMarketing.com | 860.442.9999 | www.EasyWebCreations.com
Most business owners we talk to aren’t sure if people are actually accessing their
website on a mobile device. We recently met with Gar Kenyon, a manufacturer
of a wide variety of products for the aviation industry throughout the world since
1930, located in Naugatuck, CT. Their first impression was they didn’t think
people looked at their website on mobile devices. The chart to the left, shows in
this year to date, 422 different people have looked at GarKenyon.com from a
mobile device. Additionally, there was a bounce rate of 51.18% on the mobile
website compared to only a bounce rate of 38.12% on the regular site. A bounce
is logged if a user goes to a website and leaves before visiting other pages. The
bounce rate is higher on the mobile site because their full website was not as easy to navigate as a mobile website would
be. As a result of learning this information, Gar Kenyon has decided to have us create a mobile version of their site.
There mobile website will be accessible via www.GarKenyon.com from any mobile device within the next 7 days (the
mobile site will automatically load on the iPhone, Blackberry, Galaxy, Droid, etc). Below you will see their original
website and the design concepts for their new mobile website.
Original Website Is Very Difficult To
Navigate On A Mobile Device Mobile Home Page Draft Mobile Interior Page Draft
At this point, you may be wondering what work is
involved by you, in order to have a mobile website?

It’s St. Patrick’s Day
on March 17 th
and You’re IN LUCK!
I am sharing a FREE lucky resource with you that we use to find
opportunities and the best keyword phrases. You can use this
resource to find the pot of gold in your organization!
Hi Scott,
The Luck of the Irish is obviously with you this month! I hope all is well with you! We are having
great success with our new websites, online marketing campaigns, newsletters and obviously our
direct mail campaigns.
I want to share a resource we use on a daily basis in both our marketing division, Jimmy
Marketing and our dedicated web design division, EasyWebCreations.com. This resource helps
us find the best keyword phrases to use on websites, and also helps to uncover opportunities
based on the trends of what people are searching for on Google.
FREE Resource - Google Trends
http://www.Google.com/Trends
Simply go to this website and put in any
keyword phrase. By default, Google
will show you the top related keyword
phrases based on historical data
throughout the world
since 2004.

You can also narrow the search down to the United States or even down to regions within a
state, as shown above. Furthermore, you can click on the rising tab and see what keyword
phrases are rising in interest amongst Google users and adjust the years, as shown below.
Breakout means that the search term has experienced a change in growth greater than 5000%.
Top phrases related to
landscaping in the United States
Top phrases related to
landscaping in CT

landscaping in CT since 2004
Rising phrases related to
landscaping in CT since 2008
363
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 363 of 625 --

Moreover, in
this graph
you can see
the overall
trend by
month for
the particular
keyword
phrase. To
the right we
are showing
the trend graph for landscaping related to CT. Notice how every year the peak interest is in May and
April, and the low point is in December. This data is worth a pot of gold and more to a landscaper
because they know they need to concentrate their advertising efforts during the months of March
(gearing up) through September (winding down) to capitalize on the demand of consumers. Additionally,
they can lower their marketing and advertising costs in less active months. Taking this a step further,
companies related to landscaping companies should be aware of these trends and adjust their marketing
efforts accordingly. Start using Google.com/trends to help shape your marketing plan and find hidden
opportunities in your organization!

It is estimated that 90% of ALL Internet searches will be
video related by the end of 2013!
$2.9 billion was spent on online video in 2012 – that was
23% of the total display media spent in 2012.
In 2012, 56% of consumer web traffic is watching video.
Dear James,
The use of online video is
becoming more important
than ever! More and more
web visitors are looking to
video for reviews, solutions
to their problems, and to
seek out businesses. You
may not know that Google
owns YouTube. In fact,
Google is indexing more
videos right within their
search results. What would increased visibility on the search engines
mean for your business?
The more you wait to start utilizing online video, the
harder it will be for you to catch up to your competition.
Here Are 5 Reasons Why You Should Make Online Video Part of Your
2013 Action Plan:
1. 	Video Will Leverage Your Time – Produce a video once, upload it
to YouTube and Vimeo and your audience will be able to watch the
video forever. Imagine being able to reference people to your
videos on your website. Do you find yourself telling prospects the
same things over and over? Record it once, and start leveraging
your time!
2. 	Video Will Increase Your Visibility – Having online video helps
increase your overall search engine ranking. Imagine people
searching on Google/YouTube and your videos are up there
towards the top.
3. 	Video Builds Credibility – Having video testimonials on your
website builds trust and credibility. Imagine being able to tell your
prospects to watch your online testimonial videos, right on your
website.
4. 	Video Will Differentiate You From Your Competition – More
than 95% of small businesses aren’t using online video, yet. You
can set the trend in your industry, so your competitors can chase
you.
5. 	Video Builds Rapport – People feel more comfortable watching a
video than reading just text. If you can’t physically be in front of a
prospect or client, the next best thing is video!
“James, Don’t Get Left
Stranded!”
Sample videos we ranked for
“modular home builder mystic”
Visit www.JimmysPromo.com to watch the replay of my
live broadcast, “Learn Why Video Is Important In Your
Small Business.” (w/ special guest – Fireman Mike LeMoine)

-- 374 of 625 --

New Customer Follow-Up Campaign
In 2009, I created a campaign to follow up with new customers. Through a serious of 4 mailers and 1
email sent from my Customer Relations Manager, we check in and continue to build the relationship
with the new customers and encourage future sales. We make sure they are happy with their
purchase, make sure everything is working properly, offer them the chance to buy again with a
hundred dollar off coupon, get feedback, give a few small gifts, and ultimately stay in their mind until
they may need to purchase again. The campaign goes as follows:
Immediate Follow-up Package - Welcome letter, product catalog of other solutions, $100
off coupon for a second product purchased within one year, business cards of people
available for technical support for their product.
3 Month Follow-up Package - Check in letter to make sure everything went well with their
product integration, RTA notepad for the thoughts they don’t want to forget, and a
postcard survey for the ones they want to share. The postcard is addressed to us and has
postage so they can fill out a short survey about their experience, and just drop it in the
mail. (For notepad, see Exhibit 3)
6 Month Follow-up Package - Time to start thinking about their next project. They receive
a check up letter reminding them of all the other products we have that may be of use in
the future for them. They receive a catalog of products along with a small gift of a foam
rocket torpedo toy to enjoy until their next need arises. (Exhibit 1)
1 Year Follow-up Package - We celebrate our 1 year anniversary with them as our
customer. They receive the traditional 1 year anniversary gift (the clock), along with a
hand signed card thanking them for being our customer and wishing them a happy
anniversary, as well as a product catalog. (For clock see Exhibit 2)
1.5 Year Follow-up - Customer receives an HTML email announcing that although they
are officially no longer a new customer, they will continue to receive great offers, service,
and products from us. They receive an offer for 10% off a product purchased in the next 3
months.
Results: This has been one of our most successful campaigns. This campaign has been sent to
over 400 customers, and has had on average a 5% return rate with the offers in the packages.
We have seen the percentage of sales from re-orders go up about 35% since the campaign was put
in place.
A new customer is now worth $5,600 over three years. This is a 30% increase from before the
program started.
The following are the materials for the New Customer Follow-Up Campaign:
375
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 382 of 625 --

Postcards
I like using postcards to mail to my customers because they are simple to design, easy to send out,
cheap, and customers see what they get as soon as they see the card. We don’t get a huge direct
impact on sales from postcards, but it’s is more about getting our personality out there.
Our products are like expensive wrist splint. Hard to get someone without a wrist injury to buy it, but
an easy sell when the need arises. This makes short deadlines and special offers less effective.
Staying in the mind of the customer when they have the need is the key.
With post cards being so cheap, I typically only need to make one or two product sales to cover
costs and start making a profit. I typically send out postcards to announce new products, upgrades,
or special events and sales.
The following are some of my favorite postcards:
383
www.getwsodownload.com

www.getwsodownload.com

Gateway Giveaways Campaign
Since distributors sell our product, we often don’t know who the actual end user/customer is. We use
the Gateway Giveaways Campaign to get those end users to register their product with us, thus
giving us all of their contact information.
When a customer uses their product for the first time, they connect it to a pc to configure. The first
page that comes up is an opportunity for the Gateway Giveaway. Users can register their gateway
with us to extend their warranty, and receive a small gift of their choosing.
The Gateway Giveaways page also gives a special offer for referrals. If a customer refers our
company to a friend at another company who mentions the referral when they make a purchase, we
send the original customer a USB rocket launcher as a thank you.
Results: So far we have done about over 150 Gateway Giveaways. These are customers we know
and have contact info for who have and like our product. Allowing us to market directly to in the
future.
The following pages are the letter and warranty card received after a customer registers their
gateway product with us.

SERVICE BUSINESS – To Consumers 	COPYRIGHT FREE
2-Step Seasonal-Timed Letter Sequence (AUTO REPAIR) – Step 1
Car Care Expert Predicts:
Photo Hudson Area Motorists will suffer through an
extraordinarily tough winter... batteries will die,
undercarriages rust out, brakes fail... it's gonna be a horror
show out there!
HOW TO SAVE YOUR CAR FROM
THE ATTACK OF THE "KILLER WINTER"
Dear Hudson Neighbor,
My name is Harry Horsepower, and I own the Exxon Service Station at Vine and 17'h.
You've undoubtedly driven past it a zillion times. My reason for writing to you now is that I've
just returned from a week-long conference with automotive experts from northern Ohio, one of
our guest speakers was the Regional Director of the U.S. Weather Bureau, and he has predicted
an unusually rugged, rough, bone-chilling winter - the kind of winter that will just about kill your
car if you're unprepared. 	·
And, I want to offer you THE ULTIMATE WINTER PREP PACKAGE, at an incredibly
low price, as a "get acquainted special."
I can save your car. More about that in a minute.
First, I have a totally free gift for you. With the help of a few other experts, I've prepared
a 30-PAGE ILLUSTRATED REPORT: HOW TO PREPARE AND PROTECT YOUR HOME,
CARS AND FAMILY FROM THE COMING WINTER OF ALL WINTERS. This Report
includes guidelines for weatherproofing your house, cutting down on heating bills, keeping your
car from letting you down, even fighting off colds and flu! And it includes over $100 in Savings
Coupons... discounts from the hardware store, the snow plow service, the pharmacist, and several
other local merchants.
This Report is yours FREE, just for the asking. Stop in and pick up your copy anytime -
no purchase required. Or return the enclosed postcard and we'll send it to you in the mail. But
do it now, because we've only printed up a limited supply of these Reports. When they're gone,
they're gone.
Now, let's talk about doing everything possible to safeguard your jalopy. Here's what we
can do for you:
1. 	Radiator Flush; fill with super-strength anti-freeze; check all hoses and connections
2. 	Check and charge the battery.
3. 	Install new wiper blades.
4. 	Fill your windshield wiper reservoir with anti-freeze cleaning solution
454
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 454 of 625 --

5. 	Check the brakes and brake linings.
6. 	Check the transmission.
7. 	Steam clean the engine.
8. 	Do a 56-Point top-to-bottom mechanical check-up.
That entire package'll cost just $29.95. 	And, if we uncover any problems- say you need a new
battery, new spark plugs, a hose, whatever - if you give us the go-ahead to fix it we'll discount
all parts by 10%, all labor by 20%.
SNOW TIRES ON SALE, TOO
Snow tires are also on sale, and with this $29.95 ULTIMATE PACKAGE, if you buy snow tires,
we'll install and balance them FREE. 	And we'll probably give you a trade-in allowance for your
old tires, too.
FREE WINDSHIELD SOLVENT
ALL WINTER LONG
By the way, we'll re-fill your windshield wiper reservoir tank with the anti-freeze cleanser FREE
all winter long, each time you make a minimum gasoline purchase of ten dollars.
Oh, if you have more than one care in the family, schedule both of them for these ULTIMATES.
The first one is just $29.95, the second $24.95, a third at $19.95. (We take Exxon Charge, of
course, but we also welcome VISA, MasterCard or American Express.)
TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE - THIS IS A LIMITED OFFER:
Unfortunately, we can only book 15 of these ULTIMATES each weekday, 20 on Saturday, and
they'll all be by appointment, so it's important to schedule yours now. Call me personally at
000-0000 or stop in and see me. Appointments will be going fast, so please don't procrastinate.
(Our first big 'freeze' could be less than ten days away! )
I hope I' II see you before winter comes calling.
Harry Horsepower
Horsepower's Hudson Exxon
PS: By the way, we GUARANTEE our mechanics' work. I've lived and worked here in Hudson
for 28 years, and many of our customers have been with us for ten or even fifteen years, keep
coming back, and bringing their kids. With several families, our customers bridge three
generations. I know people can fill their tanks just about anywhere; there are 19 gas stations here
in town, if you count the pump-it-yourself's at the two 7-11's. And I know there are other places
to get your car worked on- some better'n others. But I honestly believe we provide THE best,
most reliable, most experienced service you can find anywhere. 	I know that when you (or your
wife) are driving down an icy, snow-covered road after dark, there's a lot riding on the quality of
work we do. You can count on us to respect that. .
455
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 455 of 625 --

2-Step Seasonal-Timed Letter Sequence (AUTO REPAIR) - Step 2
Photo
Many people are just too darned busy to get their
cards ready for winter.
You'll be sorry.
SECOND NOTICE
Dear Neighbor,
If the experts are right, a vicious winter is just a week or so away. When it's 15 below
wind chill, snow and ice everywhere, will your car start? 	Battery have enough juice? 	Brakes
work?
Or will some darned hose crack in half?
Leave you stranded.
At the incredibly low price of just $29.95, we'll do a thorough check-up... THE
ULTIMATE WINTER PREP PACKAGE... and give you FREE de-icer solvent ALL WINTER
LONG, in your windshield tank.
All the details of this offer are spelled out in the copy of the first letter I sent you, about a
week ago (attached.)
PLEASE take a few minutes to read and consider this important offer. It may make the
difference between getting home by dinner or being one of those sad schmucks stuck on the side
of the road, care nosed into a snow drift, hood up... standing there, shivering, stomping, waiting
to be rescued.
This offer expires in 14 days.
Doing my best to kick winter's butt,
Harry Horsepower
PS: A free aerosol can of window de-icer AND a free snow-scraper. .. yours while they last as
an ADDED INCENTIVE to act on my offer. Now.

SERVICE BUSINESS – To Consumers
3-Step Home Delivery Letter Sequence (AMWAY) – Step 1
COPYRIGHT FREE
Photo
Dear Neighbor,
Busy People In Our Busier-Than-Ever 	World
Need All The "Convenience" They Can Get -
Right?
Years ago, going to the supermarket was a Saturday "family event." Today, though, there
are some things best bought at these supermarket, some best bought at a "club warehouse" (like
Price Club), some best bought at specialty stores... and to run around to ten different places to get
the best quality/price/value combinations ... cosmetics here, health foods there, cleaning stuf f
somewhere else, gardening products somewhere else, and on and on. Geez. One attempt to solve
all this has been the "to-the-home salesperson." 	You know, the Avon Lady. The Amway
Distributer. And, for some families, that sort of thing is a much-appreciated service.
One busy professional woman told me: "There are a number of Amway products that I
really like... but I’ve had distributers ‘disappear’ on me, making sure I'm home when the
distributer's coming is a hassle ..."
Well, WHAT IF You Could...
1. 	Have your choice of 400 different superior quality, money-saving, full-featured, even
fascinating products for your home, garden, family and personal us e ...
2. 	which you order DIRECT FROM THE FACTORY, whenever you want to, with a
TOLL-FREE 800 NUMBER...
3. 	always with your SATISFACTION GUARANTEE D ...
4. 	many one-of-a-kind products and gifts ...
5. 	Eliminate a lot of "shopping drudgery," lugging stuff across snowy, cold parking lots,
dealing with dumb-dumb store clerks or pushy salespeople... SAVE LOTS AND LOTS
OF TIME.
6. 	and, as a fantastic “side benefit,” replace polluting products with environmentally friendly
products ... reduce the 'filler stuff' you dump, be a "practical environmentalist"...
Of course you would! Now, as a matter of fact, all these benefits are provided by the Amway
Corporation, which I like to call "the NEW Amway," without any contact with a distributor
464
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 464 of 625 --

(unless you want that); you just sign up as a Member of PRIORITY SERVICE, use the toll-free
direct number, and have UPS (United Parcel Service) bring your chosen products right to your
doorstep! 	Right now, though, you don’t need to decide "yes" or "no." 	I'd just like your
permission to send you, in the mail, a ... no cost, no obligation. You can look everything over at
your leisure, as your convenience, and THEN choose whether or not to join Priority Service.
Just return the Postcard and I'll send you the NEW WAY TO SHOP-INFORMATION KIT right
away, free.
Thanks,
George Greenjeans
PS: I'm sure you didn’t get up this morning and say to yourself, "Hey, I hope I get a letter in the
mail today about buying Amway products." 	But you and I both know that we ARE incredibly
busy, rushed, even pressured, and we CAN use any real convenience we can get. I think you 'II
find some real value in the Free Kit that I'd like to send you.
465
www.getwsodownload.com

SERVICE BUSINESS – To Consumers
3-Step Home Delivery Letter Sequence (AMWAY) - Step 2
COPYRIGHT FREE
2ND NOTICE
Photo
Dear Neighbor,
"Let's see. It's cold, wet. A bunch of nutcases
driving around out there. So I'm going to park
six miles from the store, slog through 'gunk,' a
wet paper sack clutched under each arm, with
boxes or jugs of heavy products - gee, this
sounds like the way I want to spend my time!"
About two weeks ago, I sent you a letter introducing an exciting new way to take care of
a lot of your routine shopping - with what I'm calling THE ULTIMATE IN CONVENIENCE.
Maybe that letter, and my offer of a FREE INFORMATION KIT, somehow slipped past your
attention. I've attached a copy for that very reason.
My attached letter introduces a WHOLE NEW WAY TO SHOP WITHOUT SHOPPING
AT ALL- please take a minute to read it. The FREE INFORMATION KIT waiting for you has
all the details. Please return the enclosed Card, so I can send you your Kit. There's no cost, no
obligation.
Sincerely,
George Greenjeans
PS: Someday soon, as you drive past a crowded shopping center parking lot and look at the
people circling for parking places, pushing carts, dragging sacks, well, you just may say
"THANKS!" to me for nagging you about this new service.
PPS: Many of the products you'll be introduced to in the FREE KIT are especially kind to the
environment, so this is a way to actually do some good things for the environment without going
through a lot of expense or aggravation to do it.
466
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 466 of 625 --

SERVICE BUSINESS – To Consumers
3-Step Home Delivery Letter Sequence (AMWAY) - Step 3
COPYRIGHT FREE
Photo
Dear Neighbor,
Are You a Masochist At Heart? Forgive my
impertinent humor- but- why do you insist on
the old way of shopping... doing 'manual
labor'... when you don't have to?
I really do have a much better way. I've written twice, to offer you a FREE
INFORMATION KIT about this exciting service - now I'm afraid I must withdraw your
invitation if I don't hear from you within 10 days. This KIT will introduce you to a whole new
"world" of shop-by-phone convenience, unique products, savings, even environmental
friendliness.
Just think about two things: First, take a quick look through your kitchen cupboards,
bathroom cabinets, utility shelves, laundry room, etc. -ask yourself: if I could replace all that
stuff with one-fourth as many products, they did a better job, they cost less in use, I ordered
them by phone and they were delivered by UPS right to my doorstep, why wouldn’t I do it?
Second, visualize the shopping center or 'warehouse club' parking lot on a busy afternoon or
evening. The lines at the check-out registers. The whole thing. An hour or two a week of this
is over 1 00 hours a year, 1,000 hours in ten years, easily 5,000 or 10,000 hours in a lifetime.
Is this smart? The FREE INFORMATION KIT that's still waiting for your replaces all this
with something new and better. Much better. To get this FREE KIT and the option of joining
the Priority Service Shopping Club, you need to return the enclosed Card immediately. 	Your
invitation expires in 10 days.
Sincerely,
George Greenjeans
PS: I'm really "into" CONVENIENCE. 	NOT spending time on drudgery, so I've got more time
for fun. For things that really interest me. Are you?
467
www.getwsodownload.com

Your Home is a valuable investment worth hundreds of
thousands of dollars or more. Your hard work has earned you
this magnificent retreat. But what other investment would you
leave to non-professionals? Your portfolio? No way. Your
retirement planning? Won't happen. Your yacht? HAl So why
would you leave the property you enjoy so much to anyone but a
trained, licensed, and insured professional?
With HomeWatchValet, you get more than experience, you get
the nation's leading expert in Private Home Management,
the author of the book "Leaving Your Home-ALONE", Mark
Mehling. Recognized as one of America's Premiere Experts@,
Mark's expertise has been giving premium homeowners just like
you Peace of Mind for over 6 years.
Before you leave, honestly answer the simple questions in this
brochure. Maybe it's time you turned to a professional who
knows empty homes. What is your time worth? Instead of
wasting it fixing problems at your empty home, spend it wisely
working on your business, travel, relaxation, or philanthropy.
We guarantee our services. A complete refund of every penny if
you are not satisfied. No hassles, no problems, no lawyers
needed. Call us today to see if your property qualifies for the
ultimate in care and attention.

TkKts-/
Without you, our faithful clients, we would not have grown to be the best
personal home management company available at any price. Your trust
has been earned through hard labor, attention to detail, and an
unwavering belief that customer service can still reign supreme in
business. You trusted us when we were much smaller, you trust us with
your home, and you trust us to do what we say we will do. And we hold
onto that trust dearly and continually reinforce it.
This catalog was prepared to better explain some of the many options that
are available to you as our client. I hope you enjoy reading the humorous
descriptions as much as I enjoyed writing them. Although the effort was
fun, the work is very serious- Deb and I truly take our business- and your
confidence- very seriously.
To keep fueling our growth, we always appreciate your recommendations
and referrals.
(}~bb?
alftl
#fV'i
How did you start Home Watch Valet?
Many of our clients believe that HomeWatchValet was
started because of all the hurricanes back in 2004. It
wasn't a major hurricane, but a simple everyday event.
While walking my dog, Zoie, around the block in 2005,
there was water coming from the garage of a house
down the street. No one knew who to call, the
unknown owner was snowbirding and had been for a
couple months. No one knew who to call or what to do.
What would you do?
It was this problem that got me to thinking- why can't snowbirds have an
expert to manage their empty homes when they travel? Scheduled
visits, someone to call- an expert they can trust. They have a huge
investment in their property that may be worth as much as a retirement
portfolio.
With my aviation 'attention-to-detail background, and experience with
premium service, the seed was started. Unlike a typical neighbor or
friend, we incorporated scheduled visits, tailored checklists, emergency
communication, hurricane and storm damage plans, and even security
system type signage in case someone walking by the property saw
something wrong.
Today our service meets the needs of snowbirds, For Sale properties,
.homes left empty when residents move to assisted living, and properties
inherited by out-of-town family members. One simple idea has been
em braced by people everywhere who know the value of their beautiful
home and want professional care.
By the way, that house had a water leak from a water softener that filled
the 'sunken' living room- about $25,000 of damage. Zoie, my Akita-dog
has passed on, but every time I see that original house, I think of her.
R~t491
www.getwsodownload.com

"Just Like You Left"
VEHICLE PRESERVATION
KIT (installed)
Leaving a beautiful vehicle behind? You could just park it- and
deal with the dead battery, stale fuel clogging your engine,
moldy smells inside, and tire issues later. Or you can opt for this
package, which solves all that and more. You car's battery is
preserved, the interior kept mold and mildew free, special
stabilizers stop your fuel from turning into varnish in your
engine, and we have special space age tire protectors that stop
the rubber from absorbing the acid from your concrete floor.
This is a bargain compared to the damage from just leaving
your car sit.

plan?

it off monthly to ensure no bill goes unpaid?
(That may explain w hy the lawn service isn't
doing their job ...J

Association. utility companies, etc. Who is
your local point of contact to handle these
issues since you are gone a great distance,
and possibly out of the country?
HOW ARE YOU GRANTING HOUSE
ACCESS?
So who really gets the key?
Do you have a monthly pest service? Are
you going to just give them a key? (what
happens if they lose it, change employees, or
the Company is sold while you are gone??)

If you leave your home empty or
unoccupied for more than 30 days, your
insurance coverage DECREASES!! If you
are a Snowbird, the house is For Sale, the
owner has moved to assisted living, or
you've inherited a home, you pay the same
premiums, but now water leaks of any kind
(faucets, toilets, pipes, air conditioner),
broken windows (from storms, golf balls,
rocks from mowers), and all types of
vandalism are no longer covered and you
will not be reimbursed a single penny by the
insurance company. Plus your insurance
can be CANCELED!
Mark Mehling
Author, Educator, Speaker
Did you know that? Most snowbirds don't,
so Mark Mehling, author of the book
"Leaving Your Home-ALONE" , and a
pioneer in home watch, is on a mission to
save you from 'wallet-shock' when you
have an insurance claim on your house.
No maid, petsitter, or neighbor can stop
your insurance coverage from
DEOREASING when you are gone
more than 30 days. But we can.
We are the experts in Private Home
Management. Someone you can call
with a concern, who communicates
regularly, has scheduled visits to your
property and treats it as if it was our
own.
If you don't want your claim denied and
insurance canceled, calli us today. Ask
how you can get
TWO FREE BONUSES ($250 value)
when you sign up for our personal
service before May 1st!

single incident. You deserve the
Peace of Mind of a professional
Home Watch Service.

Hi, Mark Mehling, Founder of HomeWatchValet
here. You've made a great decision that I
personally guarantee will give you Peace of Mind
while you are away. You can relax, knowing a
single phone call will solve any concerns about
your property.
Our service begins as soon as you depart but never really ends.
We are available even when you reside in your home offering
access to our certified vendors for repair you may need. Our
'Save Your Life' smoke detector service and 'Goodbye Toilet
Troubles' services are also year round. If you selected our 'Total
Home Management' Plan, our monthly preventive maintenance
services guarantees more tee times.
Did you know you also made a green decision? Our methods
ensure you do not waste electricity by overcooling your home,
help your appliances last longer by regularly running them, and
can find problems before they start. You save money, reduce
energy usage, stop 'early retirement' of appliances, and STILL
have the peace of mind you need to enjoy your time away.

to size or weight, please give
the shipper our name and
phone number so that we
can offload the item at your
home.
Monthly newsletter. The "Your Florida HOME"
Newsletter is published monthly and sent to the
address where you currently reside. As you change
locations, we will change the address. The newsletter
is full of fun and ideas that will bring you peace of
mind, give you more time, or make you the hero with
your spouse.
After Storm property
visits. Anytime the wind
exceeds 50 kts, power is out
more than 2 hours, rain fall is
greater than 4 inches per
hour, a tornado is sighted
within 5 miles, or a hurricane hits, we initiate our
"Post Storm Survey Pian". We will contact you when
this happen, usually via email or recorded telephone,
depending on the severity of damage to the area.
Emergency Phone calls with updates
Whenever we need to communicate with all clients,
usually due to storms or other local emergencies, we
will use our "Emergency Communications System"
which will use either email or recorded phone
messages. In either case, you will receive updates of
a general nature. We will personally contact you if
there are specific property issues we need to talk
about.
Storm Mitigation Planning We maintain a
complete set of items to stop further damage to
your property in event of storm damage. Roof
leaks, shattered windows and other damage will
get temporary repairs as soon as we are able.
After initial damage control, we will contact you
with recommendations for repairs or other more
permanent solutions.
Pre-Arrival Grocery Shopping
Want your favorite wine? Breakfast cereal, milk
and eggs? Before you arrive (5 days notice works
best) we will shop for your basic items to a whole
list! You pay only for the groceries!
Pre Departure
Custom Checklist
Create your own custom 'don't forget
anything' checklist at
www.thehomewatchguy.com/checklistas
you plan your Florida departure as well as
your arrival. Merely check the items
you want to remember from the comprehensive list and the
items you check are instantly mailed to you ready to check
off!
Missed item shipping service
Leave something behind? It's a simple
email or phone call and we will expedite it
to you. We can package as well as ship, if
needed. We usually use Priority Mail for
most items but have instant access to
UPS for larger items and those requiring
tracking. Cost varies according to
package.
Medical Grade Freezer Monitor
Every freezer in your home will receive a
small unobtrusive monitoring card, the
same used in hospitals and pharmacies to
ensure drugs remain cold. Our monitor
will alert when the freezer has been
above 32F for more than 2 hours,
ensuring your food doesn't defrost, then
refreeze.
